**Mike:** first batch of code is an audio sampler I need help developing .    here is the code so far :    <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Battery-Style Sampler</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      color-scheme: dark;
      --bg: #0f172a;
      --panel: #111827;
      --accent: #22d3ee;
      --accent-strong: #06b6d4;
      --text: #e5e7eb;
      --muted: #9ca3af;
      --danger: #ef4444;
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      font-family: "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, #1f2937, #0b1120 55%);
      color: var(--text);
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    .app {
      width: min(1200px, 100%);
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, #111827 0%, #0b1120 70%);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    h1 {
      margin: 0;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #f8fafc;
      text-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    }

    .controls {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }

    .panel {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 14px;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
    }

    .panel h2 {
      margin: 0 0 8px;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #cbd5f5;
    }

    .field {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .muted {
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .field label {
      min-width: 120px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .field input[type="range"] {
      flex: 1;
    }

    .value-pill {
      padding: 6px 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    }

    .pads {
      margin-top: 20px;
      display: grid;
      gap: 12px;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    }

    .pad {
      background: #0f172a;
      border-radius: 16px;
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      padding: 12px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-rows: auto auto;
      gap: 10px;
      box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-title {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .pad-trigger {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
      border-radius: 12px;
      background: linear-gradient(140deg, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.12), rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.25));
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.4);
      color: #e0f2fe;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2);
    }

    .pad-trigger:hover {
      transform: translateY(-1px);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-trigger:active {
      transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.99);
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
    }

    .pad-trigger.empty {
      background: linear-gradient(140deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06));
      color: var(--muted);
      border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      box-shadow: none;
    }

    .pad-trigger.playing {
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.35);
      background: linear-gradient(140deg, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25), rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.35));
    }

    .pad-controls {
      display: grid;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-controls label {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="file"] {
      width: 100%;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .meta {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .tag {
      padding: 4px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.2);
      color: #99f6e4;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .stop-btn {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
      color: #fecdd3;
      border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 6px 10px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 120ms ease;
    }

    .stop-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);
    }

    .footer {
      margin-top: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      text-align: right;
    }

    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 700px) {
      body {
        padding: 12px;
      }
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
      }
      .pad-trigger {
        aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="app">
    <header>
      <div>
        <h1>Battery-Style Sampler</h1>
        <p class="muted">16 pads, drag-and-drop sample loading, tempo-aware looping.</p>
      </div>
    </header>

    <section class="controls">
      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Master</h2>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="tempo">Tempo</label>
          <input id="tempo" type="range" min="60" max="180" step="1" value="120" />
          <span class="value-pill" id="tempoValue">120 BPM</span>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="gain">Volume</label>
          <input id="gain" type="range" min="0" max="1.2" step="0.01" value="0.9" />
          <span class="value-pill" id="gainValue">0.90</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Session</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0; color: var(--muted);">Each pad supports one-shot or loop playback. Tempo detection informs time-stretching relative to the master tempo.</p>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0; color: var(--muted);">Drop MP3/WAV/FLAC files directly onto pads or use the loaders below.</p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="pads" id="pads"></section>

    <div class="footer">Tip: adjust stretch per pad to tighten sync, or tap the pad again to retrigger a one-shot.</div>
  </div>

  <script>
    const padCount = 16;
    const padsContainer = document.getElementById("pads");
    const tempoSlider = document.getElementById("tempo");
    const tempoValue = document.getElementById("tempoValue");
    const gainSlider = document.getElementById("gain");
    const gainValue = document.getElementById("gainValue");

    const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    masterGain.gain.value = parseFloat(gainSlider.value);
    masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

    const pads = Array.from({ length: padCount }, (_, index) => {
      const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
      gainNode.connect(masterGain);
      return {
        index,
        buffer: null,
        source: null,
        gainNode,
        name: `Pad ${index + 1}`,
        loop: false,
        stretch: 1,
        detectedBpm: null,
        fileName: "Empty",
        loadToken: 0,
      };
    });

    function validateFile(file) {
      const supported = /^(audio\/|\.wav$|\.mp3$|\.flac$|\.ogg$|\.aiff?$)/i;
      if (!supported.test(file.type) && !supported.test(file.name)) {
        throw new Error("Unsupported file type. Please load WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG or AIFF.");
      }
      const maxSizeMb = 50;
      if (file.size > maxSizeMb * 1024 * 1024) {
        throw new Error(`File is too large (>${maxSizeMb}MB).`);
      }
    }

    function formatFileName(name) {
      if (!name) return "Empty";
      return name.length > 18 ? `${name.slice(0, 15)}…` : name;
    }

    function updateTempoDisplay(value) {
      tempoValue.textContent = `${value} BPM`;
    }

    function updateGainDisplay(value) {
      gainValue.textContent = value.toFixed(2);
    }

    function createPadElement(pad) {
      const el = document.createElement("div");
      el.className = "pad";
      el.dataset.index = pad.index;

      const header = document.createElement("div");
      header.className = "pad-header";

      const title = document.createElement("div");
      title.className = "pad-title";
      title.textContent = pad.name;

      const fileTag = document.createElement("span");
      fileTag.className = "value-pill";
      fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(pad.fileName);

      header.appendChild(title);
      header.appendChild(fileTag);

      const meta = document.createElement("div");
      meta.className = "meta";
      const bpmTag = document.createElement("span");
      bpmTag.className = "tag";
      bpmTag.textContent = "BPM —";

      const stopBtn = document.createElement("button");
      stopBtn.className = "stop-btn";
      stopBtn.textContent = "Stop";
      stopBtn.addEventListener("click", () => stopPad(pad.index));

      meta.appendChild(bpmTag);
      meta.appendChild(stopBtn);

      const trigger = document.createElement("button");
      trigger.className = "pad-trigger empty";
      trigger.dataset.index = pad.index;
      trigger.textContent = "Empty";
      trigger.addEventListener("click", () => triggerPad(pad.index));

      const controls = document.createElement("div");
      controls.className = "pad-controls";

      const modeLabel = document.createElement("label");
      modeLabel.textContent = "Mode";
      const modeSelect = document.createElement("select");
      const oneShotOption = document.createElement("option");
      oneShotOption.value = "oneshot";
      oneShotOption.textContent = "One-shot";
      const loopOption = document.createElement("option");
      loopOption.value = "loop";
      loopOption.textContent = "Loop";
      modeSelect.appendChild(oneShotOption);
      modeSelect.appendChild(loopOption);
      modeSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        pads[pad.index].loop = e.target.value === "loop";
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.loop = pads[pad.index].loop;
        }
      });
      modeLabel.appendChild(modeSelect);

      const stretchLabel = document.createElement("label");
      stretchLabel.textContent = "Stretch";
      const stretchRange = document.createElement("input");
      stretchRange.type = "range";
      stretchRange.min = 50;
      stretchRange.max = 200;
      stretchRange.value = 100;
      stretchRange.step = 1;
      const stretchValue = document.createElement("span");
      stretchValue.className = "value-pill";
      stretchValue.textContent = "100%";
      stretchRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const ratio = Number(e.target.value) / 100;
        pads[pad.index].stretch = ratio;
        stretchValue.textContent = `${e.target.value}%`;
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.playbackRate.value = computePlaybackRate(pads[pad.index]);
        }
      });
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchRange);
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchValue);

      const fileInput = document.createElement("input");
      fileInput.type = "file";
      fileInput.accept = "audio/*";
      fileInput.addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files?.[0];
        if (file) {
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
          await loadSample(pad.index, file, { triggerElement: trigger, bpmTag, fileTag });
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
        }
      });

      controls.appendChild(modeLabel);
      controls.appendChild(stretchLabel);
      controls.appendChild(fileInput);

      el.appendChild(header);
      el.appendChild(trigger);
      el.appendChild(controls);
      el.appendChild(meta);

      // Drag + drop support
      ;[trigger, el].forEach((dropTarget) => {
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragover", (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = `2px dashed ${"var(--accent)"}`;
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragleave", () => {
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("drop", async (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
          const file = event.dataTransfer?.files?.[0];
          if (file) {
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
            await loadSample(pad.index, file, { triggerElement: trigger, bpmTag, fileTag });
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
          }
        });
      });

      return { el, trigger, bpmTag, modeSelect, stretchRange, stretchValue, fileTag };
    }

    const padElements = pads.map(createPadElement);
    padElements.forEach(({ el }) => padsContainer.appendChild(el));

    function resolveTrigger(uiRefs) {
      return uiRefs?.trigger || uiRefs?.triggerElement || null;
    }

    function setPadLoading(uiRefs, isLoading) {
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      if (!trigger) return;
      trigger.disabled = isLoading;
      trigger.textContent = isLoading ? "Loading…" : formatFileName(pads[Number(trigger.dataset.index)]?.fileName);
    }

    async function loadSample(index, file, uiRefs) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      const currentToken = ++pad.loadToken;
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      try {
        validateFile(file);
        const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
        const audioBuffer = await audioCtx.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);
        if (pad.loadToken !== currentToken) return;
        pad.buffer = audioBuffer;
        pad.fileName = file.name;
        if (trigger) {
          trigger.classList.remove("empty");
          trigger.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }
        if (uiRefs.fileTag) {
          uiRefs.fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }
        const detected = detectTempo(audioBuffer);
        pad.detectedBpm = detected;
        if (uiRefs.bpmTag) {
          uiRefs.bpmTag.textContent = detected ? `${Math.round(detected)} BPM` : "BPM —";
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to load sample", error);
        alert(error.message || "Unable to load this audio file. Please try another file.");
      }
    }

    function computePlaybackRate(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const baseTempo = pad.detectedBpm || masterTempo;
      const tempoRatio = baseTempo ? masterTempo / baseTempo : 1;
      return Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, tempoRatio * pad.stretch));
    }

    function getQuantizedStartTime(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const secondsPerBeat = 60 / masterTempo;
      const subdivisionBeats = pad.loop ? 1 : 0.25; // loops start on-beat; one-shots on quarter-beat
      const interval = Math.max(0.0625, secondsPerBeat * subdivisionBeats);
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime + 0.01; // tiny lead to avoid immediate drift
      return Math.max(now, Math.ceil(now / interval) * interval);
    }

    function triggerPad(index) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      if (!pad.buffer) {
        flashPadEmpty(index);
        return;
      }

      if (audioCtx.state === "suspended") {
        audioCtx.resume();
      }

      if (pad.source) {
        pad.source.stop();
      }

      const source = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
      source.buffer = pad.buffer;
      source.loop = pad.loop;
      source.playbackRate.value = computePlaybackRate(pad);
      source.connect(pad.gainNode);
      const startTime = getQuantizedStartTime(pad);
      source.start(startTime);
      padElements[index].trigger.classList.add("playing");

      source.onended = () => {
        if (pad.source === source) {
          pad.source = null;
          padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
        }
      };

      pad.source = source;
    }

    function stopPad(index) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      if (pad.source) {
        try {
          pad.source.stop();
        } catch (err) {
          console.warn("Source already stopped", err);
        }
        pad.source = null;
        padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
      }
    }

    function flashPadEmpty(index) {
      const trigger = padElements[index].trigger;
      trigger.classList.add("empty");
      trigger.textContent = "Load a sample";
      setTimeout(() => {
        trigger.textContent = formatFileName(pads[index].fileName);
      }, 1400);
    }

    function detectTempo(audioBuffer) {
      const channelData = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);
      const sampleRate = audioBuffer.sampleRate;
      const desiredSampleRate = 8000;
      const sampleStep = Math.max(1, Math.floor(sampleRate / desiredSampleRate));
      const sampleLength = Math.min(channelData.length, sampleRate * 45);
      const samples = new Float32Array(Math.floor(sampleLength / sampleStep));
      const secondChannel = audioBuffer.numberOfChannels > 1 ? audioBuffer.getChannelData(1) : channelData;
      for (let i = 0, j = 0; i < sampleLength; i += sampleStep, j++) {
        samples[j] = (channelData[i] + secondChannel[i]) / 2;
      }

      const minBpm = 60;
      const maxBpm = 200;
      const minLag = Math.round((desiredSampleRate * 60) / maxBpm);
      const maxLag = Math.round((desiredSampleRate * 60) / minBpm);

      let bestLag = 0;
      let bestCorrelation = 0;
      for (let lag = minLag; lag <= maxLag; lag++) {
        let correlation = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < samples.length - lag; i++) {
          correlation += samples[i] * samples[i + lag];
        }
        correlation = correlation / (samples.length - lag);
        if (correlation > bestCorrelation) {
          bestCorrelation = correlation;
          bestLag = lag;
        }
      }

      if (!bestLag) return null;
      const bpm = 60 / (bestLag / desiredSampleRate);
      return bpm;
    }

    tempoSlider.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
      updateTempoDisplay(e.target.value);
      pads.forEach((pad) => {
        if (pad.source) {
          pad.source.playbackRate.value = computePlaybackRate(pad);
        }
      });
    });

    gainSlider.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
      const value = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      masterGain.gain.value = value;
      updateGainDisplay(value);
    });

    updateTempoDisplay(Number(tempoSlider.value));
    updateGainDisplay(parseFloat(gainSlider.value));
  </script>
</body>
</html>

**GPT:** Nice, this is already a really solid starting point for a Battery-style sampler. 💿  
I’ll do two things for you right now:

1. **Tighten up a few subtle bugs / edge cases** so it’s more robust.
2. Give you a **clean, production-ready version** of the same file you can paste and run.

---

### Key improvements I made

- ✅ **Fixed file-type detection**  
  Your `validateFile` regex would reject valid filenames like `kick.wav` because it required the whole string to be `.wav`. I replaced it with extension-based matching:
  ```js
  const supportedType = /^audio\//i;
  const supportedName = /\.(wav|mp3|flac|ogg|aif|aiff)$/i;
  ```
  So now both MIME type **and/or** extension are handled correctly.

- ✅ **Safer loading state label**  
  `setPadLoading` now correctly falls back to `"Empty"` when a pad has no buffer yet, instead of trying to read an undefined `fileName`.

- ✅ **More defensive tempo detection**  
  Added guards so `detectTempo` bails early on very short samples or weird edge cases instead of doing useless work or returning junk.

- ✅ Minor polish  
  - Cleaned up the drag-outline style.
  - Kept the exact layout and behavior so your UI feels the same but is more robust.

---

### Updated full HTML (copy–paste and run)

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Battery-Style Sampler</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      color-scheme: dark;
      --bg: #0f172a;
      --panel: #111827;
      --accent: #22d3ee;
      --accent-strong: #06b6d4;
      --text: #e5e7eb;
      --muted: #9ca3af;
      --danger: #ef4444;
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      font-family: "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, #1f2937, #0b1120 55%);
      color: var(--text);
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    .app {
      width: min(1200px, 100%);
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, #111827 0%, #0b1120 70%);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    h1 {
      margin: 0;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #f8fafc;
      text-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    }

    .controls {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }

    .panel {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 14px;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
    }

    .panel h2 {
      margin: 0 0 8px;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #cbd5f5;
    }

    .field {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .muted {
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .field label {
      min-width: 120px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .field input[type="range"] {
      flex: 1;
    }

    .value-pill {
      padding: 6px 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    }

    .pads {
      margin-top: 20px;
      display: grid;
      gap: 12px;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    }

    .pad {
      background: #0f172a;
      border-radius: 16px;
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      padding: 12px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-rows: auto auto;
      gap: 10px;
      box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-title {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .pad-trigger {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
      border-radius: 12px;
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.12),
        rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.25)
      );
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.4);
      color: #e0f2fe;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease,
        border-color 120ms ease;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2);
    }

    .pad-trigger:hover {
      transform: translateY(-1px);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-trigger:active {
      transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.99);
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
    }

    .pad-trigger.empty {
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04),
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)
      );
      color: var(--muted);
      border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      box-shadow: none;
    }

    .pad-trigger.playing {
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.35);
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25),
        rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.35)
      );
    }

    .pad-controls {
      display: grid;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-controls label {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="file"] {
      width: 100%;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .meta {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .tag {
      padding: 4px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.2);
      color: #99f6e4;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .stop-btn {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
      color: #fecdd3;
      border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 6px 10px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 120ms ease;
    }

    .stop-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);
    }

    .footer {
      margin-top: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      text-align: right;
    }

    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 700px) {
      body {
        padding: 12px;
      }
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
      }
      .pad-trigger {
        aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="app">
    <header>
      <div>
        <h1>Battery-Style Sampler</h1>
        <p class="muted">
          16 pads, drag-and-drop sample loading, tempo-aware looping.
        </p>
      </div>
    </header>

    <section class="controls">
      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Master</h2>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="tempo">Tempo</label>
          <input
            id="tempo"
            type="range"
            min="60"
            max="180"
            step="1"
            value="120"
          />
          <span class="value-pill" id="tempoValue">120 BPM</span>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="gain">Volume</label>
          <input
            id="gain"
            type="range"
            min="0"
            max="1.2"
            step="0.01"
            value="0.9"
          />
          <span class="value-pill" id="gainValue">0.90</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Session</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0; color: var(--muted);">
          Each pad supports one-shot or loop playback. Tempo detection informs
          time-stretching relative to the master tempo.
        </p>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0; color: var(--muted);">
          Drop MP3/WAV/FLAC files directly onto pads or use the loaders below.
        </p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="pads" id="pads"></section>

    <div class="footer">
      Tip: adjust stretch per pad to tighten sync, or tap the pad again to
      retrigger a one-shot.
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    const padCount = 16;
    const padsContainer = document.getElementById("pads");
    const tempoSlider = document.getElementById("tempo");
    const tempoValue = document.getElementById("tempoValue");
    const gainSlider = document.getElementById("gain");
    const gainValue = document.getElementById("gainValue");

    const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    masterGain.gain.value = parseFloat(gainSlider.value);
    masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

    const pads = Array.from({ length: padCount }, (_, index) => {
      const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
      gainNode.connect(masterGain);
      return {
        index,
        buffer: null,
        source: null,
        gainNode,
        name: `Pad ${index + 1}`,
        loop: false,
        stretch: 1,
        detectedBpm: null,
        fileName: "Empty",
        loadToken: 0
      };
    });

    function validateFile(file) {
      const supportedType = /^audio\//i;
      const supportedName = /\.(wav|mp3|flac|ogg|aif|aiff)$/i;

      if (!supportedType.test(file.type) && !supportedName.test(file.name)) {
        throw new Error(
          "Unsupported file type. Please load WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG or AIFF."
        );
      }

      const maxSizeMb = 50;
      if (file.size > maxSizeMb * 1024 * 1024) {
        throw new Error(`File is too large (>${maxSizeMb}MB).`);
      }
    }

    function formatFileName(name) {
      if (!name || name === "Empty") return "Empty";
      return name.length > 18 ? `${name.slice(0, 15)}…` : name;
    }

    function updateTempoDisplay(value) {
      tempoValue.textContent = `${value} BPM`;
    }

    function updateGainDisplay(value) {
      gainValue.textContent = value.toFixed(2);
    }

    function createPadElement(pad) {
      const el = document.createElement("div");
      el.className = "pad";
      el.dataset.index = pad.index;

      const header = document.createElement("div");
      header.className = "pad-header";

      const title = document.createElement("div");
      title.className = "pad-title";
      title.textContent = pad.name;

      const fileTag = document.createElement("span");
      fileTag.className = "value-pill";
      fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(pad.fileName);

      header.appendChild(title);
      header.appendChild(fileTag);

      const meta = document.createElement("div");
      meta.className = "meta";
      const bpmTag = document.createElement("span");
      bpmTag.className = "tag";
      bpmTag.textContent = "BPM —";

      const stopBtn = document.createElement("button");
      stopBtn.className = "stop-btn";
      stopBtn.textContent = "Stop";
      stopBtn.addEventListener("click", () => stopPad(pad.index));

      meta.appendChild(bpmTag);
      meta.appendChild(stopBtn);

      const trigger = document.createElement("button");
      trigger.className = "pad-trigger empty";
      trigger.dataset.index = pad.index;
      trigger.textContent = "Empty";
      trigger.addEventListener("click", () => triggerPad(pad.index));

      const controls = document.createElement("div");
      controls.className = "pad-controls";

      const modeLabel = document.createElement("label");
      modeLabel.textContent = "Mode";
      const modeSelect = document.createElement("select");
      const oneShotOption = document.createElement("option");
      oneShotOption.value = "oneshot";
      oneShotOption.textContent = "One-shot";
      const loopOption = document.createElement("option");
      loopOption.value = "loop";
      loopOption.textContent = "Loop";
      modeSelect.appendChild(oneShotOption);
      modeSelect.appendChild(loopOption);
      modeSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        pads[pad.index].loop = e.target.value === "loop";
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.loop = pads[pad.index].loop;
        }
      });
      modeLabel.appendChild(modeSelect);

      const stretchLabel = document.createElement("label");
      stretchLabel.textContent = "Stretch";
      const stretchRange = document.createElement("input");
      stretchRange.type = "range";
      stretchRange.min = 50;
      stretchRange.max = 200;
      stretchRange.value = 100;
      stretchRange.step = 1;
      const stretchValue = document.createElement("span");
      stretchValue.className = "value-pill";
      stretchValue.textContent = "100%";
      stretchRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const ratio = Number(e.target.value) / 100;
        pads[pad.index].stretch = ratio;
        stretchValue.textContent = `${e.target.value}%`;
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.playbackRate.value =
            computePlaybackRate(pads[pad.index]);
        }
      });
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchRange);
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchValue);

      const fileInput = document.createElement("input");
      fileInput.type = "file";
      fileInput.accept = "audio/*";
      fileInput.addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files?.[0];
        if (file) {
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
          await loadSample(pad.index, file, {
            triggerElement: trigger,
            bpmTag,
            fileTag
          });
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
        }
      });

      controls.appendChild(modeLabel);
      controls.appendChild(stretchLabel);
      controls.appendChild(fileInput);

      el.appendChild(header);
      el.appendChild(trigger);
      el.appendChild(controls);
      el.appendChild(meta);

      // Drag + drop support
      [trigger, el].forEach((dropTarget) => {
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragover", (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "2px dashed var(--accent)";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragleave", () => {
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("drop", async (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
          const file = event.dataTransfer?.files?.[0];
          if (file) {
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
            await loadSample(pad.index, file, {
              triggerElement: trigger,
              bpmTag,
              fileTag
            });
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
          }
        });
      });

      return { el, trigger, bpmTag, modeSelect, stretchRange, stretchValue, fileTag };
    }

    const padElements = pads.map(createPadElement);
    padElements.forEach(({ el }) => padsContainer.appendChild(el));

    function resolveTrigger(uiRefs) {
      return uiRefs?.trigger || uiRefs?.triggerElement || null;
    }

    function setPadLoading(uiRefs, isLoading) {
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      if (!trigger) return;
      trigger.disabled = isLoading;

      if (isLoading) {
        trigger.textContent = "Loading…";
      } else {
        const idx = Number(trigger.dataset.index);
        const pad = pads[idx];
        trigger.textContent = pad && pad.buffer
          ? formatFileName(pad.fileName)
          : "Empty";
      }
    }

    async function loadSample(index, file, uiRefs) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      const currentToken = ++pad.loadToken;
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      try {
        validateFile(file);
        const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
        const audioBuffer = await audioCtx.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);
        if (pad.loadToken !== currentToken) return;

        pad.buffer = audioBuffer;
        pad.fileName = file.name;

        if (trigger) {
          trigger.classList.remove("empty");
          trigger.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }
        if (uiRefs.fileTag) {
          uiRefs.fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }

        const detected = detectTempo(audioBuffer);
        pad.detectedBpm = detected;
        if (uiRefs.bpmTag) {
          uiRefs.bpmTag.textContent = detected
            ? `${Math.round(detected)} BPM`
            : "BPM —";
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to load sample", error);
        alert(
          error.message || "Unable to load this audio file. Please try another file."
        );
      }
    }

    function computePlaybackRate(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const baseTempo = pad.detectedBpm || masterTempo;
      const tempoRatio = baseTempo ? masterTempo / baseTempo : 1;
      return Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, tempoRatio * pad.stretch));
    }

    function getQuantizedStartTime(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const secondsPerBeat = 60 / masterTempo;
      const subdivisionBeats = pad.loop ? 1 : 0.25; // loops on beat; one-shots on 1/4 beat
      const interval = Math.max(0.0625, secondsPerBeat * subdivisionBeats);
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime + 0.01;
      return Math.max(now, Math.ceil(now / interval) * interval);
    }

    function triggerPad(index) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      if (!pad.buffer) {
        flashPadEmpty(index);
        return;
      }

      if (audioCtx.state === "suspended") {
        audioCtx.resume();
      }

      if (pad.source) {
        pad.source.stop();
      }

      const source = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
      source.buffer = pad.buffer;
      source.loop = pad.loop;
      source.playbackRate.value = computePlaybackRate(pad);
      source.connect(pad.gainNode);

      const startTime = getQuantizedStartTime(pad);
      source.start(startTime);

      padElements[index].trigger.classList.add("playing");

      source.onended = () => {
        if (pad.source === source) {
          pad.source = null;
          padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
        }
      };

      pad.source = source;
    }

    function stopPad(index) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      if (pad.source) {
        try {
          pad.source.stop();
        } catch (err) {
          console.warn("Source already stopped", err);
        }
        pad.source = null;
        padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
      }
    }

    function flashPadEmpty(index) {
      const trigger = padElements[index].trigger;
      trigger.classList.add("empty");
      trigger.textContent = "Load a sample";
      setTimeout(() => {
        const pad = pads[index];
        trigger.textContent = pad && pad.buffer
          ? formatFileName(pad.fileName)
          : "Empty";
      }, 1400);
    }

    function detectTempo(audioBuffer) {
      const channelDataL = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);
      const sampleRate = audioBuffer.sampleRate;
      const desiredSampleRate = 8000;
      const sampleStep = Math.max(1, Math.floor(sampleRate / desiredSampleRate));
      const maxSeconds = 45;

      const sampleLength = Math.min(
        channelDataL.length,
        sampleRate * maxSeconds
      );
      const samplesCount = Math.floor(sampleLength / sampleStep);
      if (samplesCount < desiredSampleRate * 2) {
        // Less than ~2 seconds of audio – skip detection
        return null;
      }

      const samples = new Float32Array(samplesCount);
      const channelDataR =
        audioBuffer.numberOfChannels > 1
          ? audioBuffer.getChannelData(1)
          : channelDataL;

      for (let i = 0, j = 0; j < samplesCount; i += sampleStep, j++) {
        samples[j] = (channelDataL[i] + channelDataR[i]) * 0.5;
      }

      const minBpm = 60;
      const maxBpm = 200;
      const minLag = Math.round((desiredSampleRate * 60) / maxBpm);
      const maxLag = Math.min(
        Math.round((desiredSampleRate * 60) / minBpm),
        samples.length - 1
      );

      if (maxLag <= minLag) return null;

      let bestLag = 0;
      let bestCorrelation = 0;

      for (let lag = minLag; lag <= maxLag; lag++) {
        let correlation = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < samples.length - lag; i++) {
          correlation += samples[i] * samples[i + lag];
        }
        correlation = correlation / (samples.length - lag);
        if (correlation > bestCorrelation) {
          bestCorrelation = correlation;
          bestLag = lag;
        }
      }

      if (!bestLag) return null;
      const bpm = 60 / (bestLag / desiredSampleRate);
      return bpm;
    }

    tempoSlider.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
      updateTempoDisplay(e.target.value);
      pads.forEach((pad) => {
        if (pad.source) {
          pad.source.playbackRate.value = computePlaybackRate(pad);
        }
      });
    });

    gainSlider.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
      const value = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      masterGain.gain.value = value;
      updateGainDisplay(value);
    });

    updateTempoDisplay(Number(tempoSlider.value));
    updateGainDisplay(parseFloat(gainSlider.value));
  </script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

If you tell me the **next feature you want** (per-pad filter, ADSR, waveform editor, per-pad pitch, global stop, keyboard mapping, etc.), I’ll wire it straight into this version cleanly.

**Mike:** execute the per-pad filter and ADSR feat. ures. take your time.  use the best libraries

**GPT:** Got you. Let’s wire in **per-pad filter** + **per-pad ADSR envelope** cleanly on top of what you already have, using **native Web Audio (BiquadFilterNode + Gain envelopes)** – which is effectively the “pro” way to do this in-browser (no heavy external libs needed).

### What you get in this version

For **each pad**:

- 🎚 **Filter section**
  - Filter type: **Off / Low-pass / High-pass / Band-pass**
  - Cutoff slider: **100 Hz → 18 kHz** with live label
  - Resonance (Q) slider: 0.1 → 18

- 🕒 **ADSR Envelope (per-pad)**
  - Attack (0–1.0 s)
  - Decay (0–1.0 s)
  - Sustain (0–1.0, as level)
  - Release (0–2.0 s, applied when you hit **Stop**)

Technically:

- Each pad now has: `filterNode` + envelope params.
- Graph: `source → filterNode → gainNode → masterGain`.
- On trigger: we apply an ADSR curve to the pad’s `gainNode.gain`.
- On stop: we schedule a release ramp and stop the source after the release time.

---

## Updated Full HTML (Battery-Style Sampler + per-pad Filter & ADSR)

You can replace your current file with this as-is:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Battery-Style Sampler</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      color-scheme: dark;
      --bg: #0f172a;
      --panel: #111827;
      --accent: #22d3ee;
      --accent-strong: #06b6d4;
      --text: #e5e7eb;
      --muted: #9ca3af;
      --danger: #ef4444;
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      font-family: "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, #1f2937, #0b1120 55%);
      color: var(--text);
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    .app {
      width: min(1200px, 100%);
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, #111827 0%, #0b1120 70%);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    h1 {
      margin: 0;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #f8fafc;
      text-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    }

    .controls {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }

    .panel {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 14px;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
    }

    .panel h2 {
      margin: 0 0 8px;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #cbd5f5;
    }

    .field {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .muted {
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .field label {
      min-width: 120px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .field input[type="range"] {
      flex: 1;
    }

    .value-pill {
      padding: 6px 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    }

    .pads {
      margin-top: 20px;
      display: grid;
      gap: 12px;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    }

    .pad {
      background: #0f172a;
      border-radius: 16px;
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      padding: 12px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-rows: auto auto;
      gap: 10px;
      box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-title {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .pad-trigger {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
      border-radius: 12px;
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.12),
        rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.25)
      );
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.4);
      color: #e0f2fe;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease,
        border-color 120ms ease;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2);
    }

    .pad-trigger:hover {
      transform: translateY(-1px);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-trigger:active {
      transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.99);
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
    }

    .pad-trigger.empty {
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04),
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)
      );
      color: var(--muted);
      border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      box-shadow: none;
    }

    .pad-trigger.playing {
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.35);
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25),
        rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.35)
      );
    }

    .pad-controls {
      display: grid;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-controls label {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="file"] {
      width: 100%;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .meta {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .tag {
      padding: 4px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.2);
      color: #99f6e4;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .stop-btn {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
      color: #fecdd3;
      border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 6px 10px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 120ms ease;
    }

    .stop-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);
    }

    .footer {
      margin-top: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      text-align: right;
    }

    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 700px) {
      body {
        padding: 12px;
      }
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
      }
      .pad-trigger {
        aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="app">
    <header>
      <div>
        <h1>Battery-Style Sampler</h1>
        <p class="muted">
          16 pads, drag-and-drop sample loading, tempo-aware looping, per-pad filter & ADSR.
        </p>
      </div>
    </header>

    <section class="controls">
      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Master</h2>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="tempo">Tempo</label>
          <input
            id="tempo"
            type="range"
            min="60"
            max="180"
            step="1"
            value="120"
          />
          <span class="value-pill" id="tempoValue">120 BPM</span>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="gain">Volume</label>
          <input
            id="gain"
            type="range"
            min="0"
            max="1.2"
            step="0.01"
            value="0.9"
          />
          <span class="value-pill" id="gainValue">0.90</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Session</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0; color: var(--muted);">
          Each pad supports one-shot or loop playback with per-pad filter and ADSR envelope.
        </p>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0; color: var(--muted);">
          Drop MP3/WAV/FLAC files directly onto pads or use the loaders below.
        </p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="pads" id="pads"></section>

    <div class="footer">
      Tip: Use filter + ADSR to sculpt each pad into its own instrument.
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    const padCount = 16;
    const padsContainer = document.getElementById("pads");
    const tempoSlider = document.getElementById("tempo");
    const tempoValue = document.getElementById("tempoValue");
    const gainSlider = document.getElementById("gain");
    const gainValue = document.getElementById("gainValue");

    const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    masterGain.gain.value = parseFloat(gainSlider.value);
    masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

    const pads = Array.from({ length: padCount }, (_, index) => {
      const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
      gainNode.gain.value = 1;

      const filterNode = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
      filterNode.type = "allpass";
      filterNode.frequency.value = 8000;
      filterNode.Q.value = 0.707;
      filterNode.connect(gainNode);

      gainNode.connect(masterGain);

      return {
        index,
        buffer: null,
        source: null,
        gainNode,
        filterNode,
        name: `Pad ${index + 1}`,
        loop: false,
        stretch: 1,
        detectedBpm: null,
        fileName: "Empty",
        loadToken: 0,
        // Filter state
        filterType: "off",
        filterCutoff: 8000,
        filterResonance: 0.7,
        // ADSR
        envAttack: 0.01,
        envDecay: 0.1,
        envSustain: 0.8,
        envRelease: 0.2
      };
    });

    function validateFile(file) {
      const supportedType = /^audio\//i;
      const supportedName = /\.(wav|mp3|flac|ogg|aif|aiff)$/i;

      if (!supportedType.test(file.type) && !supportedName.test(file.name)) {
        throw new Error(
          "Unsupported file type. Please load WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG or AIFF."
        );
      }

      const maxSizeMb = 50;
      if (file.size > maxSizeMb * 1024 * 1024) {
        throw new Error(`File is too large (>${maxSizeMb}MB).`);
      }
    }

    function formatFileName(name) {
      if (!name || name === "Empty") return "Empty";
      return name.length > 18 ? `${name.slice(0, 15)}…` : name;
    }

    function formatHz(freq) {
      if (freq >= 1000) {
        return (freq / 1000).toFixed(1) + " kHz";
      }
      return Math.round(freq) + " Hz";
    }

    function updateTempoDisplay(value) {
      tempoValue.textContent = `${value} BPM`;
    }

    function updateGainDisplay(value) {
      gainValue.textContent = value.toFixed(2);
    }

    function createPadElement(pad) {
      const el = document.createElement("div");
      el.className = "pad";
      el.dataset.index = pad.index;

      const header = document.createElement("div");
      header.className = "pad-header";

      const title = document.createElement("div");
      title.className = "pad-title";
      title.textContent = pad.name;

      const fileTag = document.createElement("span");
      fileTag.className = "value-pill";
      fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(pad.fileName);

      header.appendChild(title);
      header.appendChild(fileTag);

      const meta = document.createElement("div");
      meta.className = "meta";
      const bpmTag = document.createElement("span");
      bpmTag.className = "tag";
      bpmTag.textContent = "BPM —";

      const stopBtn = document.createElement("button");
      stopBtn.className = "stop-btn";
      stopBtn.textContent = "Stop";
      stopBtn.addEventListener("click", () => stopPad(pad.index));

      meta.appendChild(bpmTag);
      meta.appendChild(stopBtn);

      const trigger = document.createElement("button");
      trigger.className = "pad-trigger empty";
      trigger.dataset.index = pad.index;
      trigger.textContent = "Empty";
      trigger.addEventListener("click", () => triggerPad(pad.index));

      const controls = document.createElement("div");
      controls.className = "pad-controls";

      // Mode
      const modeLabel = document.createElement("label");
      modeLabel.textContent = "Mode";
      const modeSelect = document.createElement("select");
      const oneShotOption = document.createElement("option");
      oneShotOption.value = "oneshot";
      oneShotOption.textContent = "One-shot";
      const loopOption = document.createElement("option");
      loopOption.value = "loop";
      loopOption.textContent = "Loop";
      modeSelect.appendChild(oneShotOption);
      modeSelect.appendChild(loopOption);
      modeSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        pads[pad.index].loop = e.target.value === "loop";
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.loop = pads[pad.index].loop;
        }
      });
      modeLabel.appendChild(modeSelect);

      // Stretch
      const stretchLabel = document.createElement("label");
      stretchLabel.textContent = "Stretch";
      const stretchRange = document.createElement("input");
      stretchRange.type = "range";
      stretchRange.min = 50;
      stretchRange.max = 200;
      stretchRange.value = 100;
      stretchRange.step = 1;
      const stretchValue = document.createElement("span");
      stretchValue.className = "value-pill";
      stretchValue.textContent = "100%";
      stretchRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const ratio = Number(e.target.value) / 100;
        pads[pad.index].stretch = ratio;
        stretchValue.textContent = `${e.target.value}%`;
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.playbackRate.value =
            computePlaybackRate(pads[pad.index]);
        }
      });
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchRange);
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchValue);

      // Filter controls
      const filterLabel = document.createElement("label");
      filterLabel.textContent = "Filter";

      const filterSelect = document.createElement("select");
      [
        { value: "off", text: "Off" },
        { value: "lowpass", text: "Low-pass" },
        { value: "highpass", text: "High-pass" },
        { value: "bandpass", text: "Band-pass" }
      ].forEach((opt) => {
        const o = document.createElement("option");
        o.value = opt.value;
        o.textContent = opt.text;
        filterSelect.appendChild(o);
      });
      filterSelect.value = pad.filterType;
      filterSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        const val = e.target.value;
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterType = val;
        p.filterNode.type = val === "off" ? "allpass" : val;
      });
      filterLabel.appendChild(filterSelect);

      const cutoffLabel = document.createElement("label");
      cutoffLabel.textContent = "Cutoff";
      const cutoffRange = document.createElement("input");
      cutoffRange.type = "range";
      cutoffRange.min = 100;
      cutoffRange.max = 18000;
      cutoffRange.value = pad.filterCutoff;
      cutoffRange.step = 1;
      const cutoffValue = document.createElement("span");
      cutoffValue.className = "value-pill";
      cutoffValue.textContent = formatHz(pad.filterCutoff);
      cutoffRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const freq = Number(e.target.value);
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterCutoff = freq;
        p.filterNode.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
        cutoffValue.textContent = formatHz(freq);
      });
      cutoffLabel.appendChild(cutoffRange);
      cutoffLabel.appendChild(cutoffValue);

      const resLabel = document.createElement("label");
      resLabel.textContent = "Resonance";
      const resRange = document.createElement("input");
      resRange.type = "range";
      resRange.min = 0.1;
      resRange.max = 18;
      resRange.step = 0.1;
      resRange.value = pad.filterResonance;
      const resValue = document.createElement("span");
      resValue.className = "value-pill";
      resValue.textContent = pad.filterResonance.toFixed(1);
      resRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const q = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterResonance = q;
        p.filterNode.Q.setValueAtTime(q, audioCtx.currentTime);
        resValue.textContent = q.toFixed(1);
      });
      resLabel.appendChild(resRange);
      resLabel.appendChild(resValue);

      // ADSR controls
      const attackLabel = document.createElement("label");
      attackLabel.textContent = "Attack";
      const attackRange = document.createElement("input");
      attackRange.type = "range";
      attackRange.min = 0;
      attackRange.max = 1;
      attackRange.step = 0.01;
      attackRange.value = pad.envAttack;
      const attackValue = document.createElement("span");
      attackValue.className = "value-pill";
      attackValue.textContent = `${pad.envAttack.toFixed(2)} s`;
      attackRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envAttack = v;
        attackValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      attackLabel.appendChild(attackRange);
      attackLabel.appendChild(attackValue);

      const decayLabel = document.createElement("label");
      decayLabel.textContent = "Decay";
      const decayRange = document.createElement("input");
      decayRange.type = "range";
      decayRange.min = 0;
      decayRange.max = 1;
      decayRange.step = 0.01;
      decayRange.value = pad.envDecay;
      const decayValue = document.createElement("span");
      decayValue.className = "value-pill";
      decayValue.textContent = `${pad.envDecay.toFixed(2)} s`;
      decayRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envDecay = v;
        decayValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      decayLabel.appendChild(decayRange);
      decayLabel.appendChild(decayValue);

      const sustainLabel = document.createElement("label");
      sustainLabel.textContent = "Sustain";
      const sustainRange = document.createElement("input");
      sustainRange.type = "range";
      sustainRange.min = 0;
      sustainRange.max = 1;
      sustainRange.step = 0.01;
      sustainRange.value = pad.envSustain;
      const sustainValue = document.createElement("span");
      sustainValue.className = "value-pill";
      sustainValue.textContent = pad.envSustain.toFixed(2);
      sustainRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envSustain = v;
        sustainValue.textContent = v.toFixed(2);
      });
      sustainLabel.appendChild(sustainRange);
      sustainLabel.appendChild(sustainValue);

      const releaseLabel = document.createElement("label");
      releaseLabel.textContent = "Release";
      const releaseRange = document.createElement("input");
      releaseRange.type = "range";
      releaseRange.min = 0;
      releaseRange.max = 2;
      releaseRange.step = 0.01;
      releaseRange.value = pad.envRelease;
      const releaseValue = document.createElement("span");
      releaseValue.className = "value-pill";
      releaseValue.textContent = `${pad.envRelease.toFixed(2)} s`;
      releaseRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envRelease = v;
        releaseValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      releaseLabel.appendChild(releaseRange);
      releaseLabel.appendChild(releaseValue);

      // File loader
      const fileInput = document.createElement("input");
      fileInput.type = "file";
      fileInput.accept = "audio/*";
      fileInput.addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files?.[0];
        if (file) {
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
          await loadSample(pad.index, file, {
            triggerElement: trigger,
            bpmTag,
            fileTag
          });
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
        }
      });

      controls.appendChild(modeLabel);
      controls.appendChild(stretchLabel);
      controls.appendChild(filterLabel);
      controls.appendChild(cutoffLabel);
      controls.appendChild(resLabel);
      controls.appendChild(attackLabel);
      controls.appendChild(decayLabel);
      controls.appendChild(sustainLabel);
      controls.appendChild(releaseLabel);
      controls.appendChild(fileInput);

      el.appendChild(header);
      el.appendChild(trigger);
      el.appendChild(controls);
      el.appendChild(meta);

      // Drag + drop support
      [trigger, el].forEach((dropTarget) => {
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragover", (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "2px dashed var(--accent)";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragleave", () => {
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("drop", async (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
          const file = event.dataTransfer?.files?.[0];
          if (file) {
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
            await loadSample(pad.index, file, {
              triggerElement: trigger,
              bpmTag,
              fileTag
            });
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
          }
        });
      });

      return {
        el,
        trigger,
        bpmTag,
        modeSelect,
        stretchRange,
        stretchValue,
        fileTag
      };
    }

    const padElements = pads.map(createPadElement);
    padElements.forEach(({ el }) => padsContainer.appendChild(el));

    function resolveTrigger(uiRefs) {
      return uiRefs?.trigger || uiRefs?.triggerElement || null;
    }

    function setPadLoading(uiRefs, isLoading) {
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      if (!trigger) return;
      trigger.disabled = isLoading;

      if (isLoading) {
        trigger.textContent = "Loading…";
      } else {
        const idx = Number(trigger.dataset.index);
        const pad = pads[idx];
        trigger.textContent =
          pad && pad.buffer ? formatFileName(pad.fileName) : "Empty";
      }
    }

    async function loadSample(index, file, uiRefs) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      const currentToken = ++pad.loadToken;
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      try {
        validateFile(file);
        const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
        const audioBuffer = await audioCtx.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);
        if (pad.loadToken !== currentToken) return;

        pad.buffer = audioBuffer;
        pad.fileName = file.name;

        if (trigger) {
          trigger.classList.remove("empty");
          trigger.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }
        if (uiRefs.fileTag) {
          uiRefs.fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }

        const detected = detectTempo(audioBuffer);
        pad.detectedBpm = detected;
        if (uiRefs.bpmTag) {
          uiRefs.bpmTag.textContent = detected
            ? `${Math.round(detected)} BPM`
            : "BPM —";
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to load sample", error);
        alert(
          error.message || "Unable to load this audio file. Please try another file."
        );
      }
    }

    function computePlaybackRate(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const baseTempo = pad.detectedBpm || masterTempo;
      const tempoRatio = baseTempo ? masterTempo / baseTempo : 1;
      return Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, tempoRatio * pad.stretch));
    }

    function getQuantizedStartTime(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const secondsPerBeat = 60 / masterTempo;
      const subdivisionBeats = pad.loop ? 1 : 0.25;
      const interval = Math.max(0.0625, secondsPerBeat * subdivisionBeats);
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime + 0.01;
      return Math.max(now, Math.ceil(now / interval) * interval);
    }

    function applyEnvelopeOnStart(pad, startTime) {
      const g = pad.gainNode.gain;
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      const t0 = Math.max(now, startTime);

      const a = Math.max(0.001, pad.envAttack);
      const d = Math.max(0.001, pad.envDecay);
      const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, pad.envSustain));

      const attackEnd = t0 + a;
      const decayEnd = attackEnd + d;

      g.cancelScheduledValues(0);
      g.setValueAtTime(0, t0);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(1, attackEnd);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(s, decayEnd);
    }

    function applyEnvelopeRelease(pad) {
      const g = pad.gainNode.gain;
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      const r = Math.max(0.001, pad.envRelease);
      const current = g.value;

      g.cancelScheduledValues(0);
      g.setValueAtTime(current, now);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, now + r);

      return now + r;
    }

    function triggerPad(index) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      if (!pad.buffer) {
        flashPadEmpty(index);
        return;
      }

      if (audioCtx.state === "suspended") {
        audioCtx.resume();
      }

      if (pad.source) {
        // Hard stop previous voice when retriggering
        try {
          pad.source.stop();
        } catch (err) {
          console.warn("Previous source already stopped", err);
        }
        pad.source = null;
      }

      const source = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
      source.buffer = pad.buffer;
      source.loop = pad.loop;
      source.playbackRate.value = computePlaybackRate(pad);
      source.connect(pad.filterNode);

      const startTime = getQuantizedStartTime(pad);
      applyEnvelopeOnStart(pad, startTime);
      source.start(startTime);

      padElements[index].trigger.classList.add("playing");

      source.onended = () => {
        if (pad.source === source) {
          pad.source = null;
          padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
        }
      };

      pad.source = source;
    }

    function stopPad(index) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      const source = pad.source;
      if (!source) return;

      let stopTime = audioCtx.currentTime;
      if (pad.envRelease > 0.005) {
        stopTime = applyEnvelopeRelease(pad);
      }

      try {
        source.stop(stopTime);
      } catch (err) {
        console.warn("Source already stopped", err);
      }

      pad.source = null;
      padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
    }

    function flashPadEmpty(index) {
      const trigger = padElements[index].trigger;
      trigger.classList.add("empty");
      trigger.textContent = "Load a sample";
      setTimeout(() => {
        const pad = pads[index];
        trigger.textContent =
          pad && pad.buffer ? formatFileName(pad.fileName) : "Empty";
      }, 1400);
    }

    function detectTempo(audioBuffer) {
      const channelDataL = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);
      const sampleRate = audioBuffer.sampleRate;
      const desiredSampleRate = 8000;
      const sampleStep = Math.max(1, Math.floor(sampleRate / desiredSampleRate));
      const maxSeconds = 45;

      const sampleLength = Math.min(
        channelDataL.length,
        sampleRate * maxSeconds
      );
      const samplesCount = Math.floor(sampleLength / sampleStep);
      if (samplesCount < desiredSampleRate * 2) {
        return null;
      }

      const samples = new Float32Array(samplesCount);
      const channelDataR =
        audioBuffer.numberOfChannels > 1
          ? audioBuffer.getChannelData(1)
          : channelDataL;

      for (let i = 0, j = 0; j < samplesCount; i += sampleStep, j++) {
        samples[j] = (channelDataL[i] + channelDataR[i]) * 0.5;
      }

      const minBpm = 60;
      const maxBpm = 200;
      const minLag = Math.round((desiredSampleRate * 60) / maxBpm);
      const maxLag = Math.min(
        Math.round((desiredSampleRate * 60) / minBpm),
        samples.length - 1
      );

      if (maxLag <= minLag) return null;

      let bestLag = 0;
      let bestCorrelation = 0;

      for (let lag = minLag; lag <= maxLag; lag++) {
        let correlation = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < samples.length - lag; i++) {
          correlation += samples[i] * samples[i + lag];
        }
        correlation = correlation / (samples.length - lag);
        if (correlation > bestCorrelation) {
          bestCorrelation = correlation;
          bestLag = lag;
        }
      }

      if (!bestLag) return null;
      const bpm = 60 / (bestLag / desiredSampleRate);
      return bpm;
    }

    tempoSlider.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
      updateTempoDisplay(e.target.value);
      pads.forEach((pad) => {
        if (pad.source) {
          pad.source.playbackRate.value = computePlaybackRate(pad);
        }
      });
    });

    gainSlider.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
      const value = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      masterGain.gain.value = value;
      updateGainDisplay(value);
    });

    updateTempoDisplay(Number(tempoSlider.value));
    updateGainDisplay(parseFloat(gainSlider.value));
  </script>
</body>
</html>
```

---

If you want the **next layer** (e.g. per-pad pitch control, pan, or a simple waveform view for each pad), tell me which one you want next and I’ll extend this build in the same style.

**Mike:** great!  making a lot of progress.  next wire up the waveform editor and per-pad pitch.

**GPT:** Love where this sampler is going. Let’s plug in:

- ✅ **Per-pad pitch** (in semitones, -24 → +24)
- ✅ **Per-pad waveform editor** with draggable **start/end** region per pad

You’ll get:

- A **waveform view per pad** (canvas), with a highlighted selection region and time labels.
- Click-and-drag on the waveform to move **start** or **end**.
- Per-pad **Pitch** slider that updates playback rate **in real time**, layered on top of your tempo-based stretch.

Below is a **full, drop-in replacement** HTML file that includes:

- Your previous **tempo-aware loops**, **per-pad filter**, **per-pad ADSR**  
- Plus **waveform editor + pitch** fully wired up.

---

### Full HTML: Battery-Style Sampler with Waveform Editor + Pitch

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Battery-Style Sampler</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      color-scheme: dark;
      --bg: #0f172a;
      --panel: #111827;
      --accent: #22d3ee;
      --accent-strong: #06b6d4;
      --text: #e5e7eb;
      --muted: #9ca3af;
      --danger: #ef4444;
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      font-family: "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, #1f2937, #0b1120 55%);
      color: var(--text);
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    .app {
      width: min(1200px, 100%);
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, #111827 0%, #0b1120 70%);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    h1 {
      margin: 0;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #f8fafc;
      text-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    }

    .controls {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }

    .panel {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 14px;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
    }

    .panel h2 {
      margin: 0 0 8px;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #cbd5f5;
    }

    .field {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .muted {
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .field label {
      min-width: 120px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .field input[type="range"] {
      flex: 1;
    }

    .value-pill {
      padding: 6px 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    }

    .pads {
      margin-top: 20px;
      display: grid;
      gap: 12px;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    }

    .pad {
      background: #0f172a;
      border-radius: 16px;
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      padding: 12px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-rows: auto auto;
      gap: 10px;
      box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-title {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .pad-trigger {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
      border-radius: 12px;
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.12),
        rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.25)
      );
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.4);
      color: #e0f2fe;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease,
        border-color 120ms ease;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2);
    }

    .pad-trigger:hover {
      transform: translateY(-1px);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-trigger:active {
      transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.99);
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
    }

    .pad-trigger.empty {
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04),
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)
      );
      color: var(--muted);
      border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      box-shadow: none;
    }

    .pad-trigger.playing {
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.35);
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25),
        rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.35)
      );
    }

    .wave-editor {
      margin-top: 6px;
      background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.85);
      border-radius: 10px;
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      padding: 4px 6px 6px;
    }

    .wave-canvas {
      width: 100%;
      height: 56px;
      display: block;
      cursor: crosshair;
    }

    .wave-info {
      margin-top: 2px;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 8px;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .pad-controls {
      display: grid;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-controls label {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="file"] {
      width: 100%;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .meta {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .tag {
      padding: 4px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.2);
      color: #99f6e4;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .stop-btn {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
      color: #fecdd3;
      border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 6px 10px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 120ms ease;
    }

    .stop-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);
    }

    .footer {
      margin-top: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      text-align: right;
    }

    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 700px) {
      body {
        padding: 12px;
      }
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
      }
      .pad-trigger {
        aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="app">
    <header>
      <div>
        <h1>Battery-Style Sampler</h1>
        <p class="muted">
          16 pads, drag-and-drop loading, tempo-aware looping, per-pad filter, ADSR, waveform & pitch.
```
