    .pad-controls label {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="file"] {
      width: 100%;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .meta {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .tag {
      padding: 4px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.2);
      color: #99f6e4;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .stop-btn {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
      color: #fecdd3;
      border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 6px 10px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 120ms ease;
    }

    .stop-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);
    }

    .btn-accent {
      background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.16);
      border-color: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.7);
      color: #a5f3fc;
    }

    .btn-accent:hover {
      background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.26);
    }

    .footer {
      margin-top: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      text-align: right;
    }

    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 700px) {
      body {
        padding: 12px;
      }
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
      }
      .pad-trigger {
        aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="app">
    <header>
      <div>
        <h1>Battery-Style Sampler</h1>
        <p class="muted">
          16 pads, drag-and-drop loading, tempo-aware looping, per-pad filter, ADSR, waveform, pitch & MIDI I/O.
        </p>
      </div>
    </header>

    <section class="controls">
      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Master</h2>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="tempo">Tempo</label>
          <input
            id="tempo"
            type="range"
            min="60"
            max="180"
            step="1"
            value="120"
          />
          <span class="value-pill" id="tempoValue">120 BPM</span>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="gain">Volume</label>
          <input
            id="gain"
            type="range"
            min="0"
            max="1.2"
            step="0.01"
            value="0.9"
          />
          <span class="value-pill" id="gainValue">0.90</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Session</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0; color: var(--muted);">
          Each pad supports one-shot/loop playback with per-pad filter, ADSR, pitch and waveform trimming.
        </p>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0; color: var(--muted);">
          Drop MP3/WAV/FLAC files directly onto pads or use the loaders below.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="panel">
        <h2>MIDI</h2>
        <p id="midiStatus" class="muted" style="margin: 0 0 8px;">
          MIDI not initialized. Click "Enable Web MIDI".
        </p>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="midiInputSelect">Input</label>
          <select id="midiInputSelect">
            <option value="">None</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="midiOutputSelect">Output</label>
          <select id="midiOutputSelect">
            <option value="">None</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <button id="midiEnableBtn" class="stop-btn btn-accent">
          Enable Web MIDI
        </button>
        <p class="muted" style="margin-top: 6px; font-size: 0.8rem;">
          Connect your Ableton Move via USB-A or USB-C. The OS exposes it as a MIDI device here.
        </p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="pads" id="pads"></section>

    <div class="footer">
      Tip: Drag the waveform edges to trim the region; use pitch + filter + ADSR to sculpt each pad. Play from your Move via notes 36–51.
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    const padCount = 16;
    const padsContainer = document.getElementById("pads");
    const tempoSlider = document.getElementById("tempo");
    const tempoValue = document.getElementById("tempoValue");
    const gainSlider = document.getElementById("gain");
    const gainValue = document.getElementById("gainValue");

    // MIDI UI refs
    const midiStatus = document.getElementById("midiStatus");
    const midiInputSelect = document.getElementById("midiInputSelect");
    const midiOutputSelect = document.getElementById("midiOutputSelect");
    const midiEnableBtn = document.getElementById("midiEnableBtn");

    // Web Audio
    const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    masterGain.gain.value = parseFloat(gainSlider.value);
    masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

    // MIDI state
    let midiAccess = null;
    let midiInput = null;
    let midiOutput = null;
    const midiBaseNote = 36; // Pad 1 = 36 (C1), Pad 2 = 37, ...
    const midiNoteMap = Array.from({ length: padCount }, (_, i) => midiBaseNote + i);

    // Pads
    const pads = Array.from({ length: padCount }, (_, index) => {
      const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
      gainNode.gain.value = 1;

      const filterNode = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
      filterNode.type = "allpass";
      filterNode.frequency.value = 8000;
      filterNode.Q.value = 0.707;
      filterNode.connect(gainNode);

      gainNode.connect(masterGain);

      return {
        index,
        buffer: null,
        source: null,
        gainNode,
        filterNode,
        name: `Pad ${index + 1}`,
        loop: false,
        stretch: 1,
        detectedBpm: null,
        fileName: "Empty",
        loadToken: 0,
        // Filter
        filterType: "off",
        filterCutoff: 8000,
        filterResonance: 0.7,
        // ADSR
        envAttack: 0.01,
        envDecay: 0.1,
        envSustain: 0.8,
        envRelease: 0.2,
        // Waveform region
        startNorm: 0,
        endNorm: 1,
        // Pitch
        pitchSemis: 0
      };
    });

    let padElements = [];

    function validateFile(file) {
      const supportedType = /^audio\//i;
      const supportedName = /\.(wav|mp3|flac|ogg|aif|aiff)$/i;

      if (!supportedType.test(file.type) && !supportedName.test(file.name)) {
        throw new Error(
          "Unsupported file type. Please load WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG or AIFF."
        );
      }

      const maxSizeMb = 50;
      if (file.size > maxSizeMb * 1024 * 1024) {
        throw new Error(`File is too large (> ${maxSizeMb}MB).`);
      }
    }

    function formatFileName(name) {
      if (!name || name === "Empty") return "Empty";
      return name.length > 18 ? `${name.slice(0, 15)}…` : name;
    }

    function formatHz(freq) {
      if (freq >= 1000) {
        return (freq / 1000).toFixed(1) + " kHz";
      }
      return Math.round(freq) + " Hz";
    }

    function updateTempoDisplay(value) {
      tempoValue.textContent = `${value} BPM`;
    }

    function updateGainDisplay(value) {
      gainValue.textContent = value.toFixed(2);
    }

    function drawWaveformForPad(index) {
      const el = padElements[index];
      if (!el || !el.waveCanvas) return;
      const canvas = el.waveCanvas;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
      const width = canvas.width;
      const height = canvas.height;
      if (!width || !height) return;

      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
      ctx.fillStyle = "#020617";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

      const pad = pads[index];

      if (!pad.buffer) {
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.8)";
        ctx.font =
          "10px system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif";
        ctx.textBaseline = "middle";
        ctx.fillText("Load a sample to see waveform", 8, height / 2);
        if (el.waveInfo) {
          el.waveInfo.textContent = "Start: 0.00s   End: —";
        }
        return;
      }

      const data = pad.buffer.getChannelData(0);
      const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(data.length / width));

      // Midline
      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(51, 65, 85, 0.9)";
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(0, height / 2);
      ctx.lineTo(width, height / 2);
      ctx.stroke();

      // Waveform
      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.85)";
      ctx.beginPath();
      for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
        let min = 1.0;
        let max = -1.0;
        const start = x * step;
        const end = Math.min(start + step, data.length);
        for (let i = start; i < end; i++) {
          const v = data[i];
          if (v < min) min = v;
          if (v > max) max = v;
        }
        const y1 = ((1 - max) * 0.5) * height;
        const y2 = ((1 - min) * 0.5) * height;
        ctx.moveTo(x, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x, y2);
      }
      ctx.stroke();

      // Selection region
      const startX = pad.startNorm * width;
      const endX = pad.endNorm * width;

      ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.16)";
      ctx.fillRect(startX, 0, Math.max(1, endX - startX), height);

      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.9)";
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(startX, 0);
      ctx.lineTo(startX, height);
      ctx.moveTo(endX, 0);
      ctx.lineTo(endX, height);
      ctx.stroke();

      if (el.waveInfo) {
        const dur = pad.buffer.duration || 0;
        const startSec = pad.startNorm * dur;
        const endSec = pad.endNorm * dur;
        el.waveInfo.textContent =
          `Start: ${startSec.toFixed(2)}s   End: ${endSec.toFixed(2)}s`;
      }
    }

    function resizeAllWaveforms() {
      if (!padElements || !padElements.length) return;
      padElements.forEach((el, index) => {
        const canvas = el.waveCanvas;
        if (!canvas) return;
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const width = Math.max(200, Math.floor(rect.width || 0));
        const height = 56;
        if (!width) return;
        if (canvas.width !== width || canvas.height !== height) {
          canvas.width = width;
          canvas.height = height;
        }
        drawWaveformForPad(index);
      });
    }

    function createPadElement(pad) {
      const el = document.createElement("div");
      el.className = "pad";
      el.dataset.index = pad.index;

      const header = document.createElement("div");
      header.className = "pad-header";

      const title = document.createElement("div");
      title.className = "pad-title";
      title.textContent = pad.name;

      const fileTag = document.createElement("span");
      fileTag.className = "value-pill";
      fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(pad.fileName);

      header.appendChild(title);
      header.appendChild(fileTag);

      const meta = document.createElement("div");
      meta.className = "meta";
      const bpmTag = document.createElement("span");
      bpmTag.className = "tag";
      bpmTag.textContent = "BPM —";

      const stopBtn = document.createElement("button");
      stopBtn.className = "stop-btn";
      stopBtn.textContent = "Stop";
      stopBtn.addEventListener("click", () => stopPad(pad.index));

      meta.appendChild(bpmTag);
      meta.appendChild(stopBtn);

      const trigger = document.createElement("button");
      trigger.className = "pad-trigger empty";
      trigger.dataset.index = pad.index;
      trigger.textContent = "Empty";
      trigger.addEventListener("click", () => triggerPad(pad.index, 1, "ui"));

      // Waveform editor
      const waveEditor = document.createElement("div");
      waveEditor.className = "wave-editor";

      const waveCanvas = document.createElement("canvas");
      waveCanvas.className = "wave-canvas";
      waveEditor.appendChild(waveCanvas);

      const waveInfo = document.createElement("div");
      waveInfo.className = "wave-info";
      waveInfo.textContent = "Start: 0.00s   End: —";
      waveEditor.appendChild(waveInfo);

      let isDragging = false;
      let dragTarget = null; // 'start' or 'end'

      function updateSelectionFromClientX(clientX) {
        const rect = waveCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const displayWidth = rect.width || 0;
        if (!displayWidth) return;
        const width = waveCanvas.width || displayWidth;
        const x = clientX - rect.left;
        const normRaw = x / width;
        const norm = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, normRaw));
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        if (dragTarget === "start") {
          p.startNorm = Math.min(norm, p.endNorm - 0.01);
        } else if (dragTarget === "end") {
          p.endNorm = Math.max(norm, p.startNorm + 0.01);
        }
        drawWaveformForPad(pad.index);
      }

      function onMove(e) {
        if (!isDragging) return;
        updateSelectionFromClientX(e.clientX);
      }

      function onUp() {
        isDragging = false;
        dragTarget = null;
        window.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMove);
        window.removeEventListener("mouseup", onUp);
      }

      waveCanvas.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        if (!p.buffer) return;
        const rect = waveCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const displayWidth = rect.width || 0;
        const width = waveCanvas.width || displayWidth || 1;
        const x = e.clientX - rect.left;

        const startX = p.startNorm * width;
        const endX = p.endNorm * width;
        const distToStart = Math.abs(x - startX);
        const distToEnd = Math.abs(x - endX);

        dragTarget = distToStart <= distToEnd ? "start" : "end";
        isDragging = true;

        updateSelectionFromClientX(e.clientX);

        window.addEventListener("mousemove", onMove);
        window.addEventListener("mouseup", onUp);
      });

      const controls = document.createElement("div");
      controls.className = "pad-controls";

      // Mode
      const modeLabel = document.createElement("label");
      modeLabel.textContent = "Mode";
      const modeSelect = document.createElement("select");
      const oneShotOption = document.createElement("option");
      oneShotOption.value = "oneshot";
      oneShotOption.textContent = "One-shot";
      const loopOption = document.createElement("option");
      loopOption.value = "loop";
      loopOption.textContent = "Loop";
      modeSelect.appendChild(oneShotOption);
      modeSelect.appendChild(loopOption);
      modeSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        pads[pad.index].loop = e.target.value === "loop";
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.loop = pads[pad.index].loop;
        }
      });
      modeLabel.appendChild(modeSelect);

      // Stretch
      const stretchLabel = document.createElement("label");
      stretchLabel.textContent = "Stretch";
      const stretchRange = document.createElement("input");
      stretchRange.type = "range";
      stretchRange.min = 50;
      stretchRange.max = 200;
      stretchRange.value = 100;
      stretchRange.step = 1;
      const stretchValue = document.createElement("span");
      stretchValue.className = "value-pill";
      stretchValue.textContent = "100%";
      stretchRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const ratio = Number(e.target.value) / 100;
        pads[pad.index].stretch = ratio;
        stretchValue.textContent = `${e.target.value}%`;
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.playbackRate.value =
            computePlaybackRate(pads[pad.index]);
        }
      });
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchRange);
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchValue);

      // Pitch
      const pitchLabel = document.createElement("label");
      pitchLabel.textContent = "Pitch";
      const pitchRange = document.createElement("input");
      pitchRange.type = "range";
      pitchRange.min = -24;
      pitchRange.max = 24;
      pitchRange.step = 0.1;
      pitchRange.value = pad.pitchSemis;
      const pitchValue = document.createElement("span");
      pitchValue.className = "value-pill";
      pitchValue.textContent = `${pad.pitchSemis.toFixed(1)} st`;
      pitchRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].pitchSemis = v;
        pitchValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(1)} st`;
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.playbackRate.value =
            computePlaybackRate(pads[pad.index]);
        }
      });
      pitchLabel.appendChild(pitchRange);
      pitchLabel.appendChild(pitchValue);

      // Filter controls
      const filterLabel = document.createElement("label");
      filterLabel.textContent = "Filter";

      const filterSelect = document.createElement("select");
      [
        { value: "off", text: "Off" },
        { value: "lowpass", text: "Low-pass" },
        { value: "highpass", text: "High-pass" },
        { value: "bandpass", text: "Band-pass" }
      ].forEach((opt) => {
        const o = document.createElement("option");
        o.value = opt.value;
        o.textContent = opt.text;
        filterSelect.appendChild(o);
      });
      filterSelect.value = pad.filterType;
      filterSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        const val = e.target.value;
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterType = val;
        p.filterNode.type = val === "off" ? "allpass" : val;
      });
      filterLabel.appendChild(filterSelect);

      const cutoffLabel = document.createElement("label");
      cutoffLabel.textContent = "Cutoff";
      const cutoffRange = document.createElement("input");
      cutoffRange.type = "range";
      cutoffRange.min = 100;
      cutoffRange.max = 18000;
      cutoffRange.value = pad.filterCutoff;
      cutoffRange.step = 1;
      const cutoffValue = document.createElement("span");
      cutoffValue.className = "value-pill";
      cutoffValue.textContent = formatHz(pad.filterCutoff);
      cutoffRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const freq = Number(e.target.value);
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterCutoff = freq;
        p.filterNode.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
        cutoffValue.textContent = formatHz(freq);
      });
      cutoffLabel.appendChild(cutoffRange);
      cutoffLabel.appendChild(cutoffValue);

      const resLabel = document.createElement("label");
      resLabel.textContent = "Resonance";
      const resRange = document.createElement("input");
      resRange.type = "range";
      resRange.min = 0.1;
      resRange.max = 18;
      resRange.step = 0.1;
      resRange.value = pad.filterResonance;
      const resValue = document.createElement("span");
      resValue.className = "value-pill";
      resValue.textContent = pad.filterResonance.toFixed(1);
      resRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const q = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterResonance = q;
        p.filterNode.Q.setValueAtTime(q, audioCtx.currentTime);
        resValue.textContent = q.toFixed(1);
      });
      resLabel.appendChild(resRange);
      resLabel.appendChild(resValue);

      // ADSR controls
      const attackLabel = document.createElement("label");
      attackLabel.textContent = "Attack";
      const attackRange = document.createElement("input");
      attackRange.type = "range";
      attackRange.min = 0;
      attackRange.max = 1;
      attackRange.step = 0.01;
      attackRange.value = pad.envAttack;
      const attackValue = document.createElement("span");
      attackValue.className = "value-pill";
      attackValue.textContent = `${pad.envAttack.toFixed(2)} s`;
      attackRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envAttack = v;
        attackValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      attackLabel.appendChild(attackRange);
      attackLabel.appendChild(attackValue);

      const decayLabel = document.createElement("label");
      decayLabel.textContent = "Decay";
      const decayRange = document.createElement("input");
      decayRange.type = "range";
      decayRange.min = 0;
      decayRange.max = 1;
      decayRange.step = 0.01;
      decayRange.value = pad.envDecay;
      const decayValue = document.createElement("span");
      decayValue.className = "value-pill";
      decayValue.textContent = `${pad.envDecay.toFixed(2)} s`;
      decayRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envDecay = v;
        decayValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      decayLabel.appendChild(decayRange);
      decayLabel.appendChild(decayValue);

      const sustainLabel = document.createElement("label");
      sustainLabel.textContent = "Sustain";
      const sustainRange = document.createElement("input");
      sustainRange.type = "range";
      sustainRange.min = 0;
      sustainRange.max = 1;
      sustainRange.step = 0.01;
      sustainRange.value = pad.envSustain;
      const sustainValue = document.createElement("span");
      sustainValue.className = "value-pill";
      sustainValue.textContent = pad.envSustain.toFixed(2);
      sustainRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envSustain = v;
        sustainValue.textContent = v.toFixed(2);
      });
      sustainLabel.appendChild(sustainRange);
      sustainLabel.appendChild(sustainValue);

      const releaseLabel = document.createElement("label");
      releaseLabel.textContent = "Release";
      const releaseRange = document.createElement("input");
      releaseRange.type = "range";
      releaseRange.min = 0;
      releaseRange.max = 2;
      releaseRange.step = 0.01;
      releaseRange.value = pad.envRelease;
      const releaseValue = document.createElement("span");
      releaseValue.className = "value-pill";
      releaseValue.textContent = `${pad.envRelease.toFixed(2)} s`;
      releaseRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envRelease = v;
        releaseValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      releaseLabel.appendChild(releaseRange);
      releaseLabel.appendChild(releaseValue);

      // File loader
      const fileInput = document.createElement("input");
      fileInput.type = "file";
      fileInput.accept = "audio/*";
      fileInput.addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files?.[0];
        if (file) {
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
          await loadSample(pad.index, file, {
            triggerElement: trigger,
            bpmTag,
            fileTag
          });
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
        }
      });

      controls.appendChild(modeLabel);
      controls.appendChild(stretchLabel);
      controls.appendChild(pitchLabel);
      controls.appendChild(filterLabel);
      controls.appendChild(cutoffLabel);
      controls.appendChild(resLabel);
      controls.appendChild(attackLabel);
      controls.appendChild(decayLabel);
      controls.appendChild(sustainLabel);
      controls.appendChild(releaseLabel);
      controls.appendChild(fileInput);

      el.appendChild(header);
      el.appendChild(trigger);
      el.appendChild(waveEditor);
      el.appendChild(controls);
      el.appendChild(meta);

      // Drag + drop support
      [trigger, el].forEach((dropTarget) => {
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragover", (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "2px dashed var(--accent)";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragleave", () => {
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("drop", async (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
          const file = event.dataTransfer?.files?.[0];
          if (file) {
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
            await loadSample(pad.index, file, {
              triggerElement: trigger,
              bpmTag,
              fileTag
            });
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
          }
        });
      });

      return {
        el,
        trigger,
        bpmTag,
        modeSelect,
        stretchRange,
        stretchValue,
        fileTag,
        waveCanvas,
        waveInfo
      };
    }

    padElements = pads.map(createPadElement);
    padElements.forEach(({ el }) => padsContainer.appendChild(el));

    function resolveTrigger(uiRefs) {
      return uiRefs?.trigger || uiRefs?.triggerElement || null;
    }

    function setPadLoading(uiRefs, isLoading) {
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      if (!trigger) return;
      trigger.disabled = isLoading;

      if (isLoading) {
        trigger.textContent = "Loading…";
      } else {
        const idx = Number(trigger.dataset.index);
        const pad = pads[idx];
        trigger.textContent =
          pad && pad.buffer ? formatFileName(pad.fileName) : "Empty";
      }
    }

    async function loadSample(index, file, uiRefs) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      const currentToken = ++pad.loadToken;
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      try {
        validateFile(file);
        const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
        const audioBuffer = await audioCtx.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);
        if (pad.loadToken !== currentToken) return;

        pad.buffer = audioBuffer;
        pad.fileName = file.name;
        pad.startNorm = 0;
        pad.endNorm = 1;

        if (trigger) {
          trigger.classList.remove("empty");
          trigger.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }
        if (uiRefs.fileTag) {
          uiRefs.fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }

        const detected = detectTempo(audioBuffer);
        pad.detectedBpm = detected;
        if (uiRefs.bpmTag) {
          uiRefs.bpmTag.textContent = detected
            ? `${Math.round(detected)} BPM`
            : "BPM —";
        }

        drawWaveformForPad(index);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to load sample", error);
        alert(
          error.message || "Unable to load this audio file. Please try another file."
        );
      }
    }

    function computePlaybackRate(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const baseTempo = pad.detectedBpm || masterTempo;
      const tempoRatio = baseTempo ? masterTempo / baseTempo : 1;
      const pitchRatio = Math.pow(2, (pad.pitchSemis || 0) / 12);
      return Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, tempoRatio * pad.stretch * pitchRatio));
    }

    function getQuantizedStartTime(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const secondsPerBeat = 60 / masterTempo;
      const subdivisionBeats = pad.loop ? 1 : 0.25;
      const interval = Math.max(0.0625, secondsPerBeat * subdivisionBeats);
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime + 0.01;
      return Math.max(now, Math.ceil(now / interval) * interval);
    }

    function applyEnvelopeOnStart(pad, startTime, velocity = 1) {
      const g = pad.gainNode.gain;
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      const t0 = Math.max(now, startTime);

      const a = Math.max(0.001, pad.envAttack);
      const d = Math.max(0.001, pad.envDecay);
      const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, pad.envSustain));
      const vel = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, velocity || 1));

      const attackEnd = t0 + a;
      const decayEnd = attackEnd + d;

      g.cancelScheduledValues(0);
      g.setValueAtTime(0, t0);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(vel, attackEnd);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(vel * s, decayEnd);
    }

    function applyEnvelopeRelease(pad) {
      const g = pad.gainNode.gain;
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      const r = Math.max(0.001, pad.envRelease);
      const current = g.value;

      g.cancelScheduledValues(0);
      g.setValueAtTime(current, now);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, now + r);

      return now + r;
    }

    function triggerPad(index, velocity = 1, source = "ui") {
      const pad = pads[index];
      if (!pad.buffer) {
        flashPadEmpty(index);
        return;
      }

      if (audioCtx.state === "suspended") {
        audioCtx.resume();
      }

      if (pad.source) {
        try {
          pad.source.stop();
        } catch (err) {
          console.warn("Previous source already stopped", err);
        }
        pad.source = null;
      }

      const buffer = pad.buffer;
      const bufferDuration = buffer.duration;
      const startOffset = pad.startNorm * bufferDuration;
      const endOffset = pad.endNorm * bufferDuration;
      const segmentDuration = Math.max(0.01, endOffset - startOffset);

      const playbackRate = computePlaybackRate(pad);

      const sourceNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
      sourceNode.buffer = buffer;
      sourceNode.loop = pad.loop;
      sourceNode.playbackRate.value = playbackRate;
      sourceNode.connect(pad.filterNode);

      const startTime = getQuantizedStartTime(pad);

      applyEnvelopeOnStart(pad, startTime, velocity);

      if (pad.loop) {
        sourceNode.loopStart = startOffset;
        sourceNode.loopEnd = endOffset;
        sourceNode.start(startTime, startOffset);
      } else {
        sourceNode.start(startTime, startOffset, segmentDuration);
      }

      padElements[index].trigger.classList.add("playing");

      sourceNode.onended = () => {
        if (pad.source === sourceNode) {
          pad.source = null;
          padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
        }
      };

      pad.source = sourceNode;

      // Optional MIDI echo OUT when triggered from UI
      if (source === "ui" && midiOutput && midiNoteMap[index] != null) {
        const note = midiNoteMap[index];
        const velByte = Math.max(
          1,
          Math.min(127, Math.round((velocity || 1) * 127))
        );
        midiOutput.send([0x90, note, velByte]);
        setTimeout(() => {
          midiOutput.send([0x80, note, 0]);
        }, 200);
      }
    }

    function stopPad(index) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      const source = pad.source;
      if (!source) return;

      let stopTime = audioCtx.currentTime;
      if (pad.envRelease > 0.005) {
        stopTime = applyEnvelopeRelease(pad);
      }

      try {
        source.stop(stopTime);
      } catch (err) {
        console.warn("Source already stopped", err);
      }

      pad.source = null;
      padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
    }

    function flashPadEmpty(index) {
      const trigger = padElements[index].trigger;
      trigger.classList.add("empty");
      trigger.textContent = "Load a sample";
      setTimeout(() => {
        const pad = pads[index];
        trigger.textContent =
          pad && pad.buffer ? formatFileName(pad.fileName) : "Empty";
      }, 1400);
    }

    // MIDI helpers
    function getPadIndexFromNote(note) {
      const idx = note - midiBaseNote;
      if (idx < 0 || idx >= padCount) return null;
      return idx;
    }

    function handleMIDIMessage(event) {
      const [status, data1, data2] = event.data;
      const cmd = status & 0xf0;
      const note = data1;
      const velocity = data2;

      const padIndex = getPadIndexFromNote(note);
      if (padIndex == null) return;

      const velNorm = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, velocity / 127));

      if (cmd === 0x90 && velocity > 0) {
        // Note on
        triggerPad(padIndex, velNorm, "midi");
      } else if (cmd === 0x80 || (cmd === 0x90 && velocity === 0)) {
        // Note off
        stopPad(padIndex);
      }
    }

    function refreshMIDIPorts() {
      if (!midiAccess) return;
      const inputs = Array.from(midiAccess.inputs.values());
      const outputs = Array.from(midiAccess.outputs.values());

      const currentInputId = midiInput?.id || "";
      const currentOutputId = midiOutput?.id || "";

      midiInputSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">None</option>';
      inputs.forEach((input) => {
        const opt = document.createElement("option");
        opt.value = input.id;
        opt.textContent = input.name || `Input ${input.id}`;
        if (input.id === currentInputId) opt.selected = true;
        midiInputSelect.appendChild(opt);
      });

      midiOutputSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">None</option>';
      outputs.forEach((output) => {
        const opt = document.createElement("option");
        opt.value = output.id;
        opt.textContent = output.name || `Output ${output.id}`;
        if (output.id === currentOutputId) opt.selected = true;
        midiOutputSelect.appendChild(opt);
      });

      if (!inputs.length) {
        midiStatus.textContent =
          "No MIDI inputs detected. Connect your Ableton Move via USB-A or USB-C.";
      } else {
        midiStatus.textContent =
          "MIDI ready. Select an input and output device.";
      }
    }

    function onMIDISuccess(access) {
      midiAccess = access;
      midiStatus.textContent = "MIDI access granted.";
      midiAccess.onstatechange = refreshMIDIPorts;
      refreshMIDIPorts();
    }

    function onMIDIFailure(err) {
      console.error("MIDI init failed", err);
      midiStatus.textContent = "Unable to access MIDI devices.";
    }

    function initMIDI() {
      if (!navigator.requestMIDIAccess) {
        midiStatus.textContent =
          "Web MIDI is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome / Edge.";
        return;
      }
      midiStatus.textContent = "Requesting MIDI access…";
      navigator
        .requestMIDIAccess({ sysex: false })
        .then(onMIDISuccess)
        .catch(onMIDIFailure);
    }

    midiEnableBtn.addEventListener("click", initMIDI);

    midiInputSelect.addEventListener("change", () => {
      if (!midiAccess) return;
      const id = midiInputSelect.value;
      if (midiInput) {
        midiInput.onmidimessage = null;
      }
      midiInput = id ? midiAccess.inputs.get(id) : null;
      if (midiInput) {
        midiInput.onmidimessage = handleMIDIMessage;
        midiStatus.textContent = `MIDI input: ${midiInput.name}`;
      } else {
        midiStatus.textContent = "MIDI input disconnected.";
      }
    });

    midiOutputSelect.addEventListener("change", () => {
      if (!midiAccess) return;
      const id = midiOutputSelect.value;
      midiOutput = id ? midiAccess.outputs.get(id) : null;
    });

    function detectTempo(audioBuffer) {
      const channelDataL = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);
      const sampleRate = audioBuffer.sampleRate;
      const desiredSampleRate = 8000;
      const sampleStep = Math.max(1, Math.floor(sampleRate / desiredSampleRate));
      const maxSeconds = 45;

      const sampleLength = Math.min(
        channelDataL.length,
        sampleRate * maxSeconds
      );
      const samplesCount = Math.floor(sampleLength / sampleStep);
      if (samplesCount < desiredSampleRate * 2) {
        return null;
      }

      const samples = new Float32Array(samplesCount);
      const channelDataR =
        audioBuffer.numberOfChannels > 1
          ? audioBuffer.getChannelData(1)
          : channelDataL;

      for (let i = 0, j = 0; j < samplesCount; i += sampleStep, j++) {
        samples[j] = (channelDataL[i] + channelDataR[i]) * 0.5;
      }

      const minBpm = 60;
      const maxBpm = 200;
      const minLag = Math.round((desiredSampleRate * 60) / maxBpm);
      const maxLag = Math.min(
        Math.round((desiredSampleRate * 60) / minBpm),
        samples.length - 1
      );

      if (maxLag <= minLag) return null;

      let bestLag = 0;
      let bestCorrelation = 0;

      for (let lag = minLag; lag <= maxLag; lag++) {
        let correlation = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < samples.length - lag; i++) {
          correlation += samples[i] * samples[i + lag];
        }
        correlation = correlation / (samples.length - lag);
        if (correlation > bestCorrelation) {
          bestCorrelation = correlation;
          bestLag = lag;
        }
      }

      if (!bestLag) return null;
      const bpm = 60 / (bestLag / desiredSampleRate);
      return bpm;
    }

    tempoSlider.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
      updateTempoDisplay(e.target.value);
      pads.forEach((pad) => {
        if (pad.source) {
          pad.source.playbackRate.value = computePlaybackRate(pad);
        }
      });
    });

    gainSlider.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
      const value = parseFloat(e.target.value);
      masterGain.gain.value = value;
      updateGainDisplay(value);
    });

    updateTempoDisplay(Number(tempoSlider.value));
    updateGainDisplay(parseFloat(gainSlider.value));

    window.addEventListener("resize", resizeAllWaveforms);
    window.setTimeout(resizeAllWaveforms, 0);
  </script>
</body>
</html>

**GPT:** Yes, this makes sense – and the code you pasted is a **complete, valid single-file app**. 🙌  

I went through what you posted line by line. A few key points:

- ✅ **HTML structure** is correct: one file with `<style>` in `<head>` and `<script>` at the bottom of `<body>`.
- ✅ **No JavaScript syntax errors**: all functions are closed properly, no missing brackets, no rogue commas.
- ✅ **All IDs used in JS exist in the DOM**:  
  - `pads`, `tempo`, `tempoValue`, `gain`, `gainValue`  
  - `midiStatus`, `midiInputSelect`, `midiOutputSelect`, `midiEnableBtn`
- ✅ **Pad graph is wired correctly**: `sourceNode → filterNode → gainNode → masterGain → destination`.
- ✅ **Waveform editor**: canvas + drag logic (`startNorm` / `endNorm`) is consistent and safe.
- ✅ **MIDI**:  
  - `navigator.requestMIDIAccess` usage is correct  
  - MIDI input/output selection and `onmidimessage` wiring is clean  
  - Mapping notes 36–51 → pads 1–16 is consistent.

The only things to be aware of (not errors, just gotchas):

1. **Web MIDI environment requirements**
   - Use **Chrome or Edge**.
   - MIDI devices (your Ableton Move) must show up as a MIDI device in the OS.
   - If you ever run into issues, it’s better to serve the file via a tiny local server (`http://localhost`) instead of double-clicking from `file://` (some browser features are stricter with `file://`).

2. **Very minor polish you *could* do (optional)**
   If you want to be ultra-clean with the envelopes, you can swap:
   ```js
   g.cancelScheduledValues(0);
   ```
   for:
   ```js
   g.cancelScheduledValues(audioCtx.currentTime);
   ```
   in both `applyEnvelopeOnStart` and `applyEnvelopeRelease`. It’s not a bug, just more “correct” in long sessions.

But bottom line: **you can save exactly what you pasted as `battery-sampler-midi.html` and run it.**  

Next good step:  

1. Open DevTools → Console in Chrome.  
2. Load the HTML file.  
3.  
   - Load a WAV/MP3 onto Pad 1.  
   - Hit the pad; you should see playback + waveform.  
   - Click **Enable Web MIDI**, select your Ableton Move as **Input**, then hit a pad on the hardware (note 36 = Pad 1).  

If anything *doesn't* behave like that (no sound, no MIDI, waveform not drawing), tell me exactly what you see and I’ll zero in on it.

**Mike:** provide the single file , HTML so I can load into my chrome browser

**GPT:** Here you go — this is the full single-file sampler you can open directly in Chrome:

**Downloadable file:**  
[Download the HTML file](sandbox:/mnt/data/battery_sampler_midi.html)

Or copy-paste from here into a file named `battery_sampler_midi.html`:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Battery-Style Sampler</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      color-scheme: dark;
      --bg: #0f172a;
      --panel: #111827;
      --accent: #22d3ee;
      --accent-strong: #06b6d4;
      --text: #e5e7eb;
      --muted: #9ca3af;
      --danger: #ef4444;
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      font-family: "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, #1f2937, #0b1120 55%);
      color: var(--text);
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    .app {
      width: min(1200px, 100%);
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, #111827 0%, #0b1120 70%);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 24px;
    }

    header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    h1 {
      margin: 0;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #f8fafc;
      text-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    }

    .controls {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }

    .panel {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 14px;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
    }

    .panel h2 {
      margin: 0 0 8px;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #cbd5f5;
    }

    .field {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .muted {
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .field label {
      min-width: 80px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .field input[type="range"],
    .field select {
      flex: 1;
    }

    .value-pill {
      padding: 6px 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    }

    .pads {
      margin-top: 20px;
      display: grid;
      gap: 12px;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    }

    .pad {
      background: #0f172a;
      border-radius: 16px;
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      padding: 12px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-rows: auto auto;
      gap: 10px;
      box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-title {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .pad-trigger {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
      border-radius: 12px;
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.12),
        rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.25)
      );
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.4);
      color: #e0f2fe;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease,
        border-color 120ms ease;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2);
    }

    .pad-trigger:hover {
      transform: translateY(-1px);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25);
    }

    .pad-trigger:active {
      transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.99);
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
    }

    .pad-trigger.empty {
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04),
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)
      );
      color: var(--muted);
      border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      box-shadow: none;
    }

    .pad-trigger.playing {
      border-color: var(--accent-strong);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.35);
      background: linear-gradient(
        140deg,
        rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25),
        rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.35)
      );
    }

    .wave-editor {
      margin-top: 6px;
      background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.85);
      border-radius: 10px;
      border: 1px solid #1f2937;
      padding: 4px 6px 6px;
    }

    .wave-canvas {
      width: 100%;
      height: 56px;
      display: block;
      cursor: crosshair;
    }

    .wave-info {
      margin-top: 2px;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 8px;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .pad-controls {
      display: grid;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .pad-controls label {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%;
    }

    .pad-controls input[type="file"] {
      width: 100%;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .meta {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    .tag {
      padding: 4px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.1);
      border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.2);
      color: #99f6e4;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .stop-btn {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
      color: #fecdd3;
      border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 6px 10px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: background 120ms ease;
    }

    .stop-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);
    }

    .btn-accent {
      background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.16);
      border-color: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.7);
      color: #a5f3fc;
    }

    .btn-accent:hover {
      background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.26);
    }

    .footer {
      margin-top: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      text-align: right;
    }

    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 700px) {
      body {
        padding: 12px;
      }
      .pads {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
      }
      .pad-trigger {
        aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="app">
    <header>
      <div>
        <h1>Battery-Style Sampler</h1>
        <p class="muted">
          16 pads, drag-and-drop loading, tempo-aware looping, per-pad filter, ADSR, waveform, pitch & MIDI I/O.
        </p>
      </div>
    </header>

    <section class="controls">
      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Master</h2>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="tempo">Tempo</label>
          <input
            id="tempo"
            type="range"
            min="60"
            max="180"
            step="1"
            value="120"
          />
          <span class="value-pill" id="tempoValue">120 BPM</span>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="gain">Volume</label>
          <input
            id="gain"
            type="range"
            min="0"
            max="1.2"
            step="0.01"
            value="0.9"
          />
          <span class="value-pill" id="gainValue">0.90</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panel">
        <h2>Session</h2>
        <p style="margin: 0; color: var(--muted);">
          Each pad supports one-shot/loop playback with per-pad filter, ADSR, pitch and waveform trimming.
        </p>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0; color: var(--muted);">
          Drop MP3/WAV/FLAC files directly onto pads or use the loaders below.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="panel">
        <h2>MIDI</h2>
        <p id="midiStatus" class="muted" style="margin: 0 0 8px;">
          MIDI not initialized. Click "Enable Web MIDI".
        </p>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="midiInputSelect">Input</label>
          <select id="midiInputSelect">
            <option value="">None</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="midiOutputSelect">Output</label>
          <select id="midiOutputSelect">
            <option value="">None</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <button id="midiEnableBtn" class="stop-btn btn-accent">
          Enable Web MIDI
        </button>
        <p class="muted" style="margin-top: 6px; font-size: 0.8rem;">
          Connect your Ableton Move via USB-A or USB-C. The OS exposes it as a MIDI device here.
        </p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="pads" id="pads"></section>

    <div class="footer">
      Tip: Drag the waveform edges to trim the region; use pitch + filter + ADSR to sculpt each pad. Play from your Move via notes 36–51.
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    const padCount = 16;
    const padsContainer = document.getElementById("pads");
    const tempoSlider = document.getElementById("tempo");
    const tempoValue = document.getElementById("tempoValue");
    const gainSlider = document.getElementById("gain");
    const gainValue = document.getElementById("gainValue");

    // MIDI UI refs
    const midiStatus = document.getElementById("midiStatus");
    const midiInputSelect = document.getElementById("midiInputSelect");
    const midiOutputSelect = document.getElementById("midiOutputSelect");
    const midiEnableBtn = document.getElementById("midiEnableBtn");

    // Web Audio
    const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    masterGain.gain.value = parseFloat(gainSlider.value);
    masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

    // MIDI state
    let midiAccess = null;
    let midiInput = null;
    let midiOutput = null;
    const midiBaseNote = 36; // Pad 1 = 36 (C1), Pad 2 = 37, ...
    const midiNoteMap = Array.from({ length: padCount }, (_, i) => midiBaseNote + i);

    // Pads
    const pads = Array.from({ length: padCount }, (_, index) => {
      const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
      gainNode.gain.value = 1;

      const filterNode = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
      filterNode.type = "allpass";
      filterNode.frequency.value = 8000;
      filterNode.Q.value = 0.707;
      filterNode.connect(gainNode);

      gainNode.connect(masterGain);

      return {
        index,
        buffer: null,
        source: null,
        gainNode,
        filterNode,
        name: `Pad ${index + 1}`,
        loop: false,
        stretch: 1,
        detectedBpm: null,
        fileName: "Empty",
        loadToken: 0,
        // Filter
        filterType: "off",
        filterCutoff: 8000,
        filterResonance: 0.7,
        // ADSR
        envAttack: 0.01,
        envDecay: 0.1,
        envSustain: 0.8,
        envRelease: 0.2,
        // Waveform region
        startNorm: 0,
        endNorm: 1,
        // Pitch
        pitchSemis: 0
      };
    });

    let padElements = [];

    function validateFile(file) {
      const supportedType = /^audio\//i;
      const supportedName = /\.(wav|mp3|flac|ogg|aif|aiff)$/i;

      if (!supportedType.test(file.type) && !supportedName.test(file.name)) {
        throw new Error(
          "Unsupported file type. Please load WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG or AIFF."
        );
      }

      const maxSizeMb = 50;
      if (file.size > maxSizeMb * 1024 * 1024) {
        throw new Error(`File is too large (> ${maxSizeMb}MB).`);
      }
    }

    function formatFileName(name) {
      if (!name || name === "Empty") return "Empty";
      return name.length > 18 ? `${name.slice(0, 15)}…` : name;
    }

    function formatHz(freq) {
      if (freq >= 1000) {
        return (freq / 1000).toFixed(1) + " kHz";
      }
      return Math.round(freq) + " Hz";
    }

    function updateTempoDisplay(value) {
      tempoValue.textContent = `${value} BPM`;
    }

    function updateGainDisplay(value) {
      gainValue.textContent = value.toFixed(2);
    }

    function drawWaveformForPad(index) {
      const el = padElements[index];
      if (!el || !el.waveCanvas) return;
      const canvas = el.waveCanvas;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
      const width = canvas.width;
      const height = canvas.height;
      if (!width || !height) return;

      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
      ctx.fillStyle = "#020617";
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

      const pad = pads[index];

      if (!pad.buffer) {
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.8)";
        ctx.font =
          "10px system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif";
        ctx.textBaseline = "middle";
        ctx.fillText("Load a sample to see waveform", 8, height / 2);
        if (el.waveInfo) {
          el.waveInfo.textContent = "Start: 0.00s   End: —";
        }
        return;
      }

      const data = pad.buffer.getChannelData(0);
      const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(data.length / width));

      // Midline
      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(51, 65, 85, 0.9)";
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(0, height / 2);
      ctx.lineTo(width, height / 2);
      ctx.stroke();

      // Waveform
      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.85)";
      ctx.beginPath();
      for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
        let min = 1.0;
        let max = -1.0;
        const start = x * step;
        const end = Math.min(start + step, data.length);
        for (let i = start; i < end; i++) {
          const v = data[i];
          if (v < min) min = v;
          if (v > max) max = v;
        }
        const y1 = ((1 - max) * 0.5) * height;
        const y2 = ((1 - min) * 0.5) * height;
        ctx.moveTo(x, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x, y2);
      }
      ctx.stroke();

      // Selection region
      const startX = pad.startNorm * width;
      const endX = pad.endNorm * width;

      ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.16)";
      ctx.fillRect(startX, 0, Math.max(1, endX - startX), height);

      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.9)";
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(startX, 0);
      ctx.lineTo(startX, height);
      ctx.moveTo(endX, 0);
      ctx.lineTo(endX, height);
      ctx.stroke();

      if (el.waveInfo) {
        const dur = pad.buffer.duration || 0;
        const startSec = pad.startNorm * dur;
        const endSec = pad.endNorm * dur;
        el.waveInfo.textContent =
          `Start: ${startSec.toFixed(2)}s   End: ${endSec.toFixed(2)}s`;
      }
    }

    function resizeAllWaveforms() {
      if (!padElements || !padElements.length) return;
      padElements.forEach((el, index) => {
        const canvas = el.waveCanvas;
        if (!canvas) return;
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const width = Math.max(200, Math.floor(rect.width || 0));
        const height = 56;
        if (!width) return;
        if (canvas.width !== width || canvas.height !== height) {
          canvas.width = width;
          canvas.height = height;
        }
        drawWaveformForPad(index);
      });
    }

    function createPadElement(pad) {
      const el = document.createElement("div");
      el.className = "pad";
      el.dataset.index = pad.index;

      const header = document.createElement("div");
      header.className = "pad-header";

      const title = document.createElement("div");
      title.className = "pad-title";
      title.textContent = pad.name;

      const fileTag = document.createElement("span");
      fileTag.className = "value-pill";
      fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(pad.fileName);

      header.appendChild(title);
      header.appendChild(fileTag);

      const meta = document.createElement("div");
      meta.className = "meta";
      const bpmTag = document.createElement("span");
      bpmTag.className = "tag";
      bpmTag.textContent = "BPM —";

      const stopBtn = document.createElement("button");
      stopBtn.className = "stop-btn";
      stopBtn.textContent = "Stop";
      stopBtn.addEventListener("click", () => stopPad(pad.index));

      meta.appendChild(bpmTag);
      meta.appendChild(stopBtn);

      const trigger = document.createElement("button");
      trigger.className = "pad-trigger empty";
      trigger.dataset.index = pad.index;
      trigger.textContent = "Empty";
      trigger.addEventListener("click", () => triggerPad(pad.index, 1, "ui"));

      // Waveform editor
      const waveEditor = document.createElement("div");
      waveEditor.className = "wave-editor";

      const waveCanvas = document.createElement("canvas");
      waveCanvas.className = "wave-canvas";
      waveEditor.appendChild(waveCanvas);

      const waveInfo = document.createElement("div");
      waveInfo.className = "wave-info";
      waveInfo.textContent = "Start: 0.00s   End: —";
      waveEditor.appendChild(waveInfo);

      let isDragging = false;
      let dragTarget = null; // 'start' or 'end'

      function updateSelectionFromClientX(clientX) {
        const rect = waveCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const displayWidth = rect.width || 0;
        if (!displayWidth) return;
        const width = waveCanvas.width || displayWidth;
        const x = clientX - rect.left;
        const normRaw = x / width;
        const norm = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, normRaw));
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        if (dragTarget === "start") {
          p.startNorm = Math.min(norm, p.endNorm - 0.01);
        } else if (dragTarget === "end") {
          p.endNorm = Math.max(norm, p.startNorm + 0.01);
        }
        drawWaveformForPad(pad.index);
      }

      function onMove(e) {
        if (!isDragging) return;
        updateSelectionFromClientX(e.clientX);
      }

      function onUp() {
        isDragging = false;
        dragTarget = null;
        window.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMove);
        window.removeEventListener("mouseup", onUp);
      }

      waveCanvas.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        if (!p.buffer) return;
        const rect = waveCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const displayWidth = rect.width || 0;
        const width = waveCanvas.width || displayWidth || 1;
        const x = e.clientX - rect.left;

        const startX = p.startNorm * width;
        const endX = p.endNorm * width;
        const distToStart = Math.abs(x - startX);
        const distToEnd = Math.abs(x - endX);

        dragTarget = distToStart <= distToEnd ? "start" : "end";
        isDragging = true;

        updateSelectionFromClientX(e.clientX);

        window.addEventListener("mousemove", onMove);
        window.addEventListener("mouseup", onUp);
      });

      const controls = document.createElement("div");
      controls.className = "pad-controls";

      // Mode
      const modeLabel = document.createElement("label");
      modeLabel.textContent = "Mode";
      const modeSelect = document.createElement("select");
      const oneShotOption = document.createElement("option");
      oneShotOption.value = "oneshot";
      oneShotOption.textContent = "One-shot";
      const loopOption = document.createElement("option");
      loopOption.value = "loop";
      loopOption.textContent = "Loop";
      modeSelect.appendChild(oneShotOption);
      modeSelect.appendChild(loopOption);
      modeSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        pads[pad.index].loop = e.target.value === "loop";
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.loop = pads[pad.index].loop;
        }
      });
      modeLabel.appendChild(modeSelect);

      // Stretch
      const stretchLabel = document.createElement("label");
      stretchLabel.textContent = "Stretch";
      const stretchRange = document.createElement("input");
      stretchRange.type = "range";
      stretchRange.min = 50;
      stretchRange.max = 200;
      stretchRange.value = 100;
      stretchRange.step = 1;
      const stretchValue = document.createElement("span");
      stretchValue.className = "value-pill";
      stretchValue.textContent = "100%";
      stretchRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const ratio = Number(e.target.value) / 100;
        pads[pad.index].stretch = ratio;
        stretchValue.textContent = `${e.target.value}%`;
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.playbackRate.value =
            computePlaybackRate(pads[pad.index]);
        }
      });
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchRange);
      stretchLabel.appendChild(stretchValue);

      // Pitch
      const pitchLabel = document.createElement("label");
      pitchLabel.textContent = "Pitch";
      const pitchRange = document.createElement("input");
      pitchRange.type = "range";
      pitchRange.min = -24;
      pitchRange.max = 24;
      pitchRange.step = 0.1;
      pitchRange.value = pad.pitchSemis;
      const pitchValue = document.createElement("span");
      pitchValue.className = "value-pill";
      pitchValue.textContent = `${pad.pitchSemis.toFixed(1)} st`;
      pitchRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].pitchSemis = v;
        pitchValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(1)} st`;
        if (pads[pad.index].source) {
          pads[pad.index].source.playbackRate.value =
            computePlaybackRate(pads[pad.index]);
        }
      });
      pitchLabel.appendChild(pitchRange);
      pitchLabel.appendChild(pitchValue);

      // Filter controls
      const filterLabel = document.createElement("label");
      filterLabel.textContent = "Filter";

      const filterSelect = document.createElement("select");
      [
        { value: "off", text: "Off" },
        { value: "lowpass", text: "Low-pass" },
        { value: "highpass", text: "High-pass" },
        { value: "bandpass", text: "Band-pass" }
      ].forEach((opt) => {
        const o = document.createElement("option");
        o.value = opt.value;
        o.textContent = opt.text;
        filterSelect.appendChild(o);
      });
      filterSelect.value = pad.filterType;
      filterSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
        const val = e.target.value;
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterType = val;
        p.filterNode.type = val === "off" ? "allpass" : val;
      });
      filterLabel.appendChild(filterSelect);

      const cutoffLabel = document.createElement("label");
      cutoffLabel.textContent = "Cutoff";
      const cutoffRange = document.createElement("input");
      cutoffRange.type = "range";
      cutoffRange.min = 100;
      cutoffRange.max = 18000;
      cutoffRange.value = pad.filterCutoff;
      cutoffRange.step = 1;
      const cutoffValue = document.createElement("span");
      cutoffValue.className = "value-pill";
      cutoffValue.textContent = formatHz(pad.filterCutoff);
      cutoffRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const freq = Number(e.target.value);
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterCutoff = freq;
        p.filterNode.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
        cutoffValue.textContent = formatHz(freq);
      });
      cutoffLabel.appendChild(cutoffRange);
      cutoffLabel.appendChild(cutoffValue);

      const resLabel = document.createElement("label");
      resLabel.textContent = "Resonance";
      const resRange = document.createElement("input");
      resRange.type = "range";
      resRange.min = 0.1;
      resRange.max = 18;
      resRange.step = 0.1;
      resRange.value = pad.filterResonance;
      const resValue = document.createElement("span");
      resValue.className = "value-pill";
      resValue.textContent = pad.filterResonance.toFixed(1);
      resRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const q = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        const p = pads[pad.index];
        p.filterResonance = q;
        p.filterNode.Q.setValueAtTime(q, audioCtx.currentTime);
        resValue.textContent = q.toFixed(1);
      });
      resLabel.appendChild(resRange);
      resLabel.appendChild(resValue);

      // ADSR controls
      const attackLabel = document.createElement("label");
      attackLabel.textContent = "Attack";
      const attackRange = document.createElement("input");
      attackRange.type = "range";
      attackRange.min = 0;
      attackRange.max = 1;
      attackRange.step = 0.01;
      attackRange.value = pad.envAttack;
      const attackValue = document.createElement("span");
      attackValue.className = "value-pill";
      attackValue.textContent = `${pad.envAttack.toFixed(2)} s`;
      attackRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envAttack = v;
        attackValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      attackLabel.appendChild(attackRange);
      attackLabel.appendChild(attackValue);

      const decayLabel = document.createElement("label");
      decayLabel.textContent = "Decay";
      const decayRange = document.createElement("input");
      decayRange.type = "range";
      decayRange.min = 0;
      decayRange.max = 1;
      decayRange.step = 0.01;
      decayRange.value = pad.envDecay;
      const decayValue = document.createElement("span");
      decayValue.className = "value-pill";
      decayValue.textContent = `${pad.envDecay.toFixed(2)} s`;
      decayRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envDecay = v;
        decayValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      decayLabel.appendChild(decayRange);
      decayLabel.appendChild(decayValue);

      const sustainLabel = document.createElement("label");
      sustainLabel.textContent = "Sustain";
      const sustainRange = document.createElement("input");
      sustainRange.type = "range";
      sustainRange.min = 0;
      sustainRange.max = 1;
      sustainRange.step = 0.01;
      sustainRange.value = pad.envSustain;
      const sustainValue = document.createElement("span");
      sustainValue.className = "value-pill";
      sustainValue.textContent = pad.envSustain.toFixed(2);
      sustainRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envSustain = v;
        sustainValue.textContent = v.toFixed(2);
      });
      sustainLabel.appendChild(sustainRange);
      sustainLabel.appendChild(sustainValue);

      const releaseLabel = document.createElement("label");
      releaseLabel.textContent = "Release";
      const releaseRange = document.createElement("input");
      releaseRange.type = "range";
      releaseRange.min = 0;
      releaseRange.max = 2;
      releaseRange.step = 0.01;
      releaseRange.value = pad.envRelease;
      const releaseValue = document.createElement("span");
      releaseValue.className = "value-pill";
      releaseValue.textContent = `${pad.envRelease.toFixed(2)} s`;
      releaseRange.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
        const v = parseFloat(e.target.value);
        pads[pad.index].envRelease = v;
        releaseValue.textContent = `${v.toFixed(2)} s`;
      });
      releaseLabel.appendChild(releaseRange);
      releaseLabel.appendChild(releaseValue);

      // File loader
      const fileInput = document.createElement("input");
      fileInput.type = "file";
      fileInput.accept = "audio/*";
      fileInput.addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files?.[0];
        if (file) {
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
          await loadSample(pad.index, file, {
            triggerElement: trigger,
            bpmTag,
            fileTag
          });
          setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
        }
      });

      controls.appendChild(modeLabel);
      controls.appendChild(stretchLabel);
      controls.appendChild(pitchLabel);
      controls.appendChild(filterLabel);
      controls.appendChild(cutoffLabel);
      controls.appendChild(resLabel);
      controls.appendChild(attackLabel);
      controls.appendChild(decayLabel);
      controls.appendChild(sustainLabel);
      controls.appendChild(releaseLabel);
      controls.appendChild(fileInput);

      el.appendChild(header);
      el.appendChild(trigger);
      el.appendChild(waveEditor);
      el.appendChild(controls);
      el.appendChild(meta);

      // Drag + drop support
      [trigger, el].forEach((dropTarget) => {
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragover", (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "2px dashed var(--accent)";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("dragleave", () => {
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
        });
        dropTarget.addEventListener("drop", async (event) => {
          event.preventDefault();
          dropTarget.style.outline = "none";
          const file = event.dataTransfer?.files?.[0];
          if (file) {
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, true);
            await loadSample(pad.index, file, {
              triggerElement: trigger,
              bpmTag,
              fileTag
            });
            setPadLoading({ trigger }, false);
          }
        });
      });

      return {
        el,
        trigger,
        bpmTag,
        modeSelect,
        stretchRange,
        stretchValue,
        fileTag,
        waveCanvas,
        waveInfo
      };
    }

    padElements = pads.map(createPadElement);
    padElements.forEach(({ el }) => padsContainer.appendChild(el));

    function resolveTrigger(uiRefs) {
      return uiRefs?.trigger || uiRefs?.triggerElement || null;
    }

    function setPadLoading(uiRefs, isLoading) {
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      if (!trigger) return;
      trigger.disabled = isLoading;

      if (isLoading) {
        trigger.textContent = "Loading…";
      } else {
        const idx = Number(trigger.dataset.index);
        const pad = pads[idx];
        trigger.textContent =
          pad && pad.buffer ? formatFileName(pad.fileName) : "Empty";
      }
    }

    async function loadSample(index, file, uiRefs) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      const currentToken = ++pad.loadToken;
      const trigger = resolveTrigger(uiRefs);
      try {
        validateFile(file);
        const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
        const audioBuffer = await audioCtx.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);
        if (pad.loadToken !== currentToken) return;

        pad.buffer = audioBuffer;
        pad.fileName = file.name;
        pad.startNorm = 0;
        pad.endNorm = 1;

        if (trigger) {
          trigger.classList.remove("empty");
          trigger.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }
        if (uiRefs.fileTag) {
          uiRefs.fileTag.textContent = formatFileName(file.name);
        }

        const detected = detectTempo(audioBuffer);
        pad.detectedBpm = detected;
        if (uiRefs.bpmTag) {
          uiRefs.bpmTag.textContent = detected
            ? `${Math.round(detected)} BPM`
            : "BPM —";
        }

        drawWaveformForPad(index);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to load sample", error);
        alert(
          error.message || "Unable to load this audio file. Please try another file."
        );
      }
    }

    function computePlaybackRate(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const baseTempo = pad.detectedBpm || masterTempo;
      const tempoRatio = baseTempo ? masterTempo / baseTempo : 1;
      const pitchRatio = Math.pow(2, (pad.pitchSemis || 0) / 12);
      return Math.max(0.25, Math.min(4, tempoRatio * pad.stretch * pitchRatio));
    }

    function getQuantizedStartTime(pad) {
      const masterTempo = Number(tempoSlider.value);
      const secondsPerBeat = 60 / masterTempo;
      const subdivisionBeats = pad.loop ? 1 : 0.25;
      const interval = Math.max(0.0625, secondsPerBeat * subdivisionBeats);
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime + 0.01;
      return Math.max(now, Math.ceil(now / interval) * interval);
    }

    function applyEnvelopeOnStart(pad, startTime, velocity = 1) {
      const g = pad.gainNode.gain;
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      const t0 = Math.max(now, startTime);

      const a = Math.max(0.001, pad.envAttack);
      const d = Math.max(0.001, pad.envDecay);
      const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, pad.envSustain));
      const vel = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, velocity || 1));

      const attackEnd = t0 + a;
      const decayEnd = attackEnd + d;

      g.cancelScheduledValues(0);
      g.setValueAtTime(0, t0);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(vel, attackEnd);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(vel * s, decayEnd);
    }

    function applyEnvelopeRelease(pad) {
      const g = pad.gainNode.gain;
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      const r = Math.max(0.001, pad.envRelease);
      const current = g.value;

      g.cancelScheduledValues(0);
      g.setValueAtTime(current, now);
      g.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, now + r);

      return now + r;
    }

    function triggerPad(index, velocity = 1, source = "ui") {
      const pad = pads[index];
      if (!pad.buffer) {
        flashPadEmpty(index);
        return;
      }

      if (audioCtx.state === "suspended") {
        audioCtx.resume();
      }

      if (pad.source) {
        try {
          pad.source.stop();
        } catch (err) {
          console.warn("Previous source already stopped", err);
        }
        pad.source = null;
      }

      const buffer = pad.buffer;
      const bufferDuration = buffer.duration;
      const startOffset = pad.startNorm * bufferDuration;
      const endOffset = pad.endNorm * bufferDuration;
      const segmentDuration = Math.max(0.01, endOffset - startOffset);

      const playbackRate = computePlaybackRate(pad);

      const sourceNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
      sourceNode.buffer = buffer;
      sourceNode.loop = pad.loop;
      sourceNode.playbackRate.value = playbackRate;
      sourceNode.connect(pad.filterNode);

      const startTime = getQuantizedStartTime(pad);

      applyEnvelopeOnStart(pad, startTime, velocity);

      if (pad.loop) {
        sourceNode.loopStart = startOffset;
        sourceNode.loopEnd = endOffset;
        sourceNode.start(startTime, startOffset);
      } else {
        sourceNode.start(startTime, startOffset, segmentDuration);
      }

      padElements[index].trigger.classList.add("playing");

      sourceNode.onended = () => {
        if (pad.source === sourceNode) {
          pad.source = null;
          padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
        }
      };

      pad.source = sourceNode;

      // Optional MIDI echo OUT when triggered from UI
      if (source === "ui" && midiOutput && midiNoteMap[index] != null) {
        const note = midiNoteMap[index];
        const velByte = Math.max(
          1,
          Math.min(127, Math.round((velocity || 1) * 127))
        );
        midiOutput.send([0x90, note, velByte]);
        setTimeout(() => {
          midiOutput.send([0x80, note, 0]);
        }, 200);
      }
    }

    function stopPad(index) {
      const pad = pads[index];
      const source = pad.source;
      if (!source) return;

      let stopTime = audioCtx.currentTime;
      if (pad.envRelease > 0.005) {
        stopTime = applyEnvelopeRelease(pad);
      }

      try {
        source.stop(stopTime);
      } catch (err) {
        console.warn("Source already stopped", err);
      }

      pad.source = null;
      padElements[index].trigger.classList.remove("playing");
    }

    function flashPadEmpty(index) {
      const trigger = padElements[index].trigger;
      trigger.classList.add("empty");
      trigger.textContent = "Load a sample";
      setTimeout(() => {
        const pad = pads[index];
        trigger.textContent =
          pad && pad.buffer ? formatFileName(pad.fileName) : "Empty";
      }, 1400);
    }

    // MIDI helpers
    function getPadIndexFromNote(note) {
      const idx = note - midiBaseNote;
      if (idx < 0 || idx >= padCount) return null;
      return idx;
    }

    function handleMIDIMessage(event) {
      const [status, data1, data2] = event.data;
      const cmd = status & 0xf0;
      const note = data1;
      const velocity = data2;

      const padIndex = getPadIndexFromNote(note);
      if (padIndex == null) return;

      const velNorm = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, velocity / 127));

      if (cmd === 0x90 && velocity > 0) {
        // Note on
        triggerPad(padIndex, velNorm, "midi");
      } else if (cmd === 0x80 || (cmd === 0x90 && velocity === 0)) {
        // Note off
        stopPad(padIndex);
      }
    }

    function refreshMIDIPorts() {
      if (!midiAccess) return;
      const inputs = Array.from(midiAccess.inputs.values());
      const outputs = Array.from(midiAccess.outputs.values());

      const currentInputId = midiInput?.id || "";
      const currentOutputId = midiOutput?.id || "";

      midiInputSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">None</option>';
      inputs.forEach((input) => {
        const opt = document.createElement("option");
        opt.value = input.id;
        opt.textContent = input.name || `Input ${input.id}`;
        if (input.id === currentInputId) opt.selected = true;
        midiInputSelect.appendChild(opt);
      });

      midiOutputSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">None</option>';
      outputs.forEach((output) => {
        const opt = document.createElement("option");
        opt.value = output.id;
        opt.textContent = output.name || `Output ${output.id}`;
        if (output.id === currentOutputId) opt.selected = true;
        midiOutputSelect.appendChild(opt);
      });

      if (!inputs.length) {
        midiStatus.textContent =
          "No MIDI inputs detected. Connect your Ableton Move via USB-A or USB-C.";
      } else {
        midiStatus.textContent =
          "MIDI ready. Select an input and output device.";
      }
    }

    function onMIDISuccess(access) {
      midiAccess = access;
      midiStatus.textContent = "MIDI access granted.";
      midiAccess.onstatechange = refreshMIDIPorts;
      refreshMIDIPorts();
    }

    function onMIDIFailure(err) {
      console.error("MIDI init failed", err);
      midiStatus.textContent = "Unable to access MIDI devices.";
    }

    function initMIDI() {
      if (!navigator.requestMIDIAccess) {
        midiStatus.textContent =
          "Web MIDI is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome / Edge.";
        return;
      }
      midiStatus.textContent = "Requesting MIDI access…";
      navigator
```
