## 3️⃣ Replace the old `createImpulseResponse` block with a preset IR engine

### 🔍 Find and delete this old block

In your current script, **remove** this:

```js
function createImpulseResponse(ctx, duration = 2.5, decay = 2.5) {
  const rate = ctx.sampleRate;
  const length = rate * duration;
  const impulse = ctx.createBuffer(2, length, rate);
  for (let c = 0; c < 2; c++) {
    const ch = impulse.getChannelData(c);
    for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) {
      const t = i / length;
      ch[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * Math.pow(1 - t, decay);
    }
  }
  return impulse;
}

const reverbConvolver = audioCtx.createConvolver();
reverbConvolver.buffer = createImpulseResponse(audioCtx, 2.4, 2.8);
const reverbOut = audioCtx.createGain();
reverbOut.gain.value = 0.9;
reverbConvolver.connect(reverbOut);
reverbOut.connect(masterGain);
```

### ✅ Replace it with this convolution reverb + 5-preset IR library

Put this **right after**:

```js
const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
masterGain.gain.value = parseFloat(gainSlider.value);
masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
```

```js
// 🔊 Convolution Reverb Preset Library (Altiverb-style, algorithmic approximations)
// NOTE: These are *stylized* spaces inspired by real rooms, not actual captured IRs.
const REVERB_PRESETS = [
  {
    id: "teldex_stage",
    name: "Teldex Scoring, Berlin",
    lengthSec: 2.6,
    decayPower: 3.4,
    preDelaySec: 0.020,
    hfDamp: 0.45,
    gain: 1.0,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.012, gain: 0.9,  stereoOffset: 0.0007 },
      { time: 0.019, gain: 0.75, stereoOffset: -0.0010 },
      { time: 0.031, gain: 0.60 },
      { time: 0.047, gain: 0.45 },
      { time: 0.069, gain: 0.35 }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "kaufman_astoria",
    name: "Kaufman Astoria, New York",
    lengthSec: 1.9,
    decayPower: 2.8,
    preDelaySec: 0.024,
    hfDamp: 0.35,
    gain: 1.0,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.008, gain: 0.85, stereoOffset: 0.0003 },
      { time: 0.016, gain: 0.72, stereoOffset: -0.0006 },
      { time: 0.027, gain: 0.55 },
      { time: 0.041, gain: 0.40 }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "grand_hall",
    name: "Grand Concert Hall",
    lengthSec: 2.9,
    decayPower: 4.0,
    preDelaySec: 0.030,
    hfDamp: 0.50,
    gain: 1.1,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.014, gain: 0.95, stereoOffset: 0.0008 },
      { time: 0.022, gain: 0.80, stereoOffset: -0.0008 },
      { time: 0.036, gain: 0.65 },
      { time: 0.055, gain: 0.50 },
      { time: 0.078, gain: 0.40 },
      { time: 0.102, gain: 0.30 }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "studio_room",
    name: "Tight Studio Room",
    lengthSec: 0.9,
    decayPower: 2.2,
    preDelaySec: 0.005,
    hfDamp: 0.20,
    gain: 0.9,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.004, gain: 0.9,  stereoOffset: 0.0002 },
      { time: 0.008, gain: 0.7,  stereoOffset: -0.0002 },
      { time: 0.013, gain: 0.5 },
      { time: 0.020, gain: 0.35 }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "vintage_plate",
    name: "Vintage Plate",
    lengthSec: 1.6,
    decayPower: 2.6,
    preDelaySec: 0.010,
    hfDamp: 0.10,
    gain: 1.2,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.005, gain: 0.95 },
      { time: 0.011, gain: 0.80 },
      { time: 0.018, gain: 0.65 }
    ]
  }
];

// Generate a stereo impulse from a preset: noise tail + early reflections, with pre-delay & HF damping
function generateImpulseResponse(ctx, preset) {
  const rate = ctx.sampleRate;
  const lengthSec = preset.lengthSec || 2.5;
  const length = Math.max(1, Math.floor(rate * lengthSec));
  const buffer = ctx.createBuffer(2, length, rate);

  const decayPower = preset.decayPower || 3.0;
  const gain = preset.gain || 1.0;
  const preDelaySamples = Math.floor(rate * (preset.preDelaySec || 0));
  const early = preset.earlyReflections || [];
  const hfDamp = preset.hfDamp ?? 0.0;

  for (let ch = 0; ch < buffer.numberOfChannels; ch++) {
    const data = buffer.getChannelData(ch);

    // Diffuse tail (random noise with exponential/frequency-shaped decay)
    for (let i = preDelaySamples; i < length; i++) {
      const tNorm = (i - preDelaySamples) / Math.max(1, (length - preDelaySamples));
      let env = Math.pow(1 - tNorm, decayPower);   // energy rolloff
      let hf = 1 - hfDamp * tNorm;                 // darker tail towards the end
      if (hf < 0) hf = 0;
      const amp = env * hf * gain;
      data[i] += (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * amp;
    }

    // Early reflections
    early.forEach((ref) => {
      const time = ref.time || 0;
      const baseIndex = preDelaySamples + Math.floor(time * rate);
      let idx = baseIndex;

      if (ref.stereoOffset && buffer.numberOfChannels === 2) {
        const offsetSamples = Math.floor(Math.abs(ref.stereoOffset) * rate);
        if (ch === 0 && ref.stereoOffset < 0) idx -= offsetSamples;
        else if (ch === 0 && ref.stereoOffset > 0) idx += offsetSamples;
        else if (ch === 1 && ref.stereoOffset < 0) idx += offsetSamples;
        else if (ch === 1 && ref.stereoOffset > 0) idx -= offsetSamples;
      }

      if (idx >= 0 && idx < length) {
        const refGain = (ref.gain || 1) * gain;
        data[idx] += (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * refGain;
      }
    });
  }

  return buffer;
}

// Global convolution reverb node using the preset library
const reverbConvolver = audioCtx.createConvolver();
const reverbOut = audioCtx.createGain();
reverbOut.gain.value = 0.9;
reverbConvolver.connect(reverbOut);
reverbOut.connect(masterGain);

// Map + loader
const reverbPresetMap = {};
REVERB_PRESETS.forEach((p) => {
  reverbPresetMap[p.id] = p;
});

function loadReverbPreset(id) {
  const preset = reverbPresetMap[id] || REVERB_PRESETS[0];
  reverbConvolver.buffer = generateImpulseResponse(audioCtx, preset);
}

// Initialize default preset (Teldex-style scoring stage)
loadReverbPreset("teldex_stage");

// Hook UI dropdown → reverb engine
if (reverbPresetSelect) {
  reverbPresetSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    loadReverbPreset(e.target.value);
  });
}
```

Your **per-pad reverb sends** (`reverbSend` in the pad constructor) stay exactly the same:

```js
const reverbSend = audioCtx.createGain();
reverbSend.gain.value = 0.0;

filterNode.connect(reverbSend);
reverbSend.connect(reverbConvolver);
```

So now:

- Each pad controls **how much** it feeds into the global convo reverb.
- The **character** of that reverb (room / hall / plate / studio) is picked from the **5-slot IR library**, Altiverb-style, from the Master panel.

- Add **per-pad space selection** (e.g., drums in “Studio Room”, strings in “Grand Hall”) by creating multiple shared convolvers or precomputing buffers and swapping sends.

## 1️⃣ Update the Master panel (HTML) to add the Reverb preset selector

Find this block in your HTML:

```html
<div class="panel">
  <h2>Master</h2>
  <div class="field">
    <label for="tempo">Tempo</label>
    <input id="tempo" type="range" min="60" max="180" step="1" value="120" />
    <span class="value-pill" id="tempoValue">120 BPM</span>
  </div>
  <div class="field">
    <label for="gain">Volume</label>
    <input id="gain" type="range" min="0" max="1.2" step="0.01" value="0.9" />
    <span class="value-pill" id="gainValue">0.90</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

Replace it with this:

```html
<div class="panel">
  <h2>Master</h2>
  <div class="field">
    <label for="tempo">Tempo</label>
    <input id="tempo" type="range" min="60" max="180" step="1" value="120" />
    <span class="value-pill" id="tempoValue">120 BPM</span>
  </div>
  <div class="field">
    <label for="gain">Volume</label>
    <input id="gain" type="range" min="0" max="1.2" step="0.01" value="0.9" />
    <span class="value-pill" id="gainValue">0.90</span>
  </div>

  <!-- 🔊 New: Convolution Reverb Preset Selector -->
  <div class="field">
    <label for="reverbPreset">Reverb</label>
    <select id="reverbPreset">
      <option value="teldex_stage">Teldex Scoring, Berlin</option>
      <option value="kaufman_astoria">Kaufman Astoria, New York</option>
      <option value="grand_hall">Grand Concert Hall</option>
      <option value="studio_room">Tight Studio Room</option>
      <option value="vintage_plate">Vintage Plate</option>
    </select>
  </div>
</div>
```

## 3️⃣ Replace the old reverb block with the convolution reverb + 5-preset IR library

### 3.1 Find and remove the old reverb code

In your script, right after you create the `audioCtx` and `masterGain`, you currently have something like:

```js
const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
masterGain.gain.value = parseFloat(gainSlider.value);
masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

function createImpulseResponse(ctx, duration = 2.5, decay = 2.5) {
  const rate = ctx.sampleRate;
  const length = rate * duration;
  const impulse = ctx.createBuffer(2, length, rate);
  for (let c = 0; c < 2; c++) {
    const ch = impulse.getChannelData(c);
    for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) {
      const t = i / length;
      ch[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * Math.pow(1 - t, decay);
    }
  }
  return impulse;
}

const reverbConvolver = audioCtx.createConvolver();
reverbConvolver.buffer = createImpulseResponse(audioCtx, 2.4, 2.8);
const reverbOut = audioCtx.createGain();
reverbOut.gain.value = 0.9;
reverbConvolver.connect(reverbOut);
reverbOut.connect(masterGain);
```

**Delete the `createImpulseResponse` function and that `reverbConvolver` / `reverbOut` block**.

### 3.2 Replace it with this convolution reverb preset engine

Immediately after:

```js
const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
const masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
masterGain.gain.value = parseFloat(gainSlider.value);
masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
```

paste this:

```js
// 🔊 Convolution Reverb Preset Library (Altiverb-style, algorithmic approximations)
// NOTE: These are *stylized* spaces inspired by real rooms, not actual captured IRs.
const REVERB_PRESETS = [
  {
    id: "teldex_stage",
    name: "Teldex Scoring, Berlin",
    lengthSec: 2.6,
    decayPower: 3.4,
    preDelaySec: 0.020,
    hfDamp: 0.45,
    gain: 1.0,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.012, gain: 0.9,  stereoOffset: 0.0007 },
      { time: 0.019, gain: 0.75, stereoOffset: -0.0010 },
      { time: 0.031, gain: 0.60 },
      { time: 0.047, gain: 0.45 },
      { time: 0.069, gain: 0.35 }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "kaufman_astoria",
    name: "Kaufman Astoria, New York",
    lengthSec: 1.9,
    decayPower: 2.8,
    preDelaySec: 0.024,
    hfDamp: 0.35,
    gain: 1.0,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.008, gain: 0.85, stereoOffset: 0.0003 },
      { time: 0.016, gain: 0.72, stereoOffset: -0.0006 },
      { time: 0.027, gain: 0.55 },
      { time: 0.041, gain: 0.40 }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "grand_hall",
    name: "Grand Concert Hall",
    lengthSec: 2.9,
    decayPower: 4.0,
    preDelaySec: 0.030,
    hfDamp: 0.50,
    gain: 1.1,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.014, gain: 0.95, stereoOffset: 0.0008 },
      { time: 0.022, gain: 0.80, stereoOffset: -0.0008 },
      { time: 0.036, gain: 0.65 },
      { time: 0.055, gain: 0.50 },
      { time: 0.078, gain: 0.40 },
      { time: 0.102, gain: 0.30 }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "studio_room",
    name: "Tight Studio Room",
    lengthSec: 0.9,
    decayPower: 2.2,
    preDelaySec: 0.005,
    hfDamp: 0.20,
    gain: 0.9,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.004, gain: 0.9,  stereoOffset: 0.0002 },
      { time: 0.008, gain: 0.7,  stereoOffset: -0.0002 },
      { time: 0.013, gain: 0.5 },
      { time: 0.020, gain: 0.35 }
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "vintage_plate",
    name: "Vintage Plate",
    lengthSec: 1.6,
    decayPower: 2.6,
    preDelaySec: 0.010,
    hfDamp: 0.10,
    gain: 1.2,
    earlyReflections: [
      { time: 0.005, gain: 0.95 },
      { time: 0.011, gain: 0.80 },
      { time: 0.018, gain: 0.65 }
    ]
  }
];

// Generate a stereo impulse from a preset: noise tail + early reflections, with pre-delay & HF damping
function generateImpulseResponse(ctx, preset) {
  const rate = ctx.sampleRate;
  const lengthSec = preset.lengthSec || 2.5;
  const length = Math.max(1, Math.floor(rate * lengthSec));
  const buffer = ctx.createBuffer(2, length, rate);

  const decayPower = preset.decayPower || 3.0;
  const gain = preset.gain || 1.0;
  const preDelaySamples = Math.floor(rate * (preset.preDelaySec || 0));
  const early = preset.earlyReflections || [];
  const hfDamp = preset.hfDamp ?? 0.0;

  for (let ch = 0; ch < buffer.numberOfChannels; ch++) {
    const data = buffer.getChannelData(ch);

    // Diffuse tail (random noise with exponential/frequency-shaped decay)
    for (let i = preDelaySamples; i < length; i++) {
      const tNorm = (i - preDelaySamples) / Math.max(1, (length - preDelaySamples));
      let env = Math.pow(1 - tNorm, decayPower);   // energy rolloff
      let hf = 1 - hfDamp * tNorm;                 // darker tail towards the end
      if (hf < 0) hf = 0;
      const amp = env * hf * gain;
      data[i] += (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * amp;
    }

    // Early reflections
    early.forEach((ref) => {
      const time = ref.time || 0;
      const baseIndex = preDelaySamples + Math.floor(time * rate);
      let idx = baseIndex;

      if (ref.stereoOffset && buffer.numberOfChannels === 2) {
        const offsetSamples = Math.floor(Math.abs(ref.stereoOffset) * rate);
        if (ch === 0 && ref.stereoOffset < 0) idx -= offsetSamples;
        else if (ch === 0 && ref.stereoOffset > 0) idx += offsetSamples;
        else if (ch === 1 && ref.stereoOffset < 0) idx += offsetSamples;
        else if (ch === 1 && ref.stereoOffset > 0) idx -= offsetSamples;
      }

      if (idx >= 0 && idx < length) {
        const refGain = (ref.gain || 1) * gain;
        data[idx] += (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * refGain;
      }
    });
  }

  return buffer;
}

// Global convolution reverb node using the preset library
const reverbConvolver = audioCtx.createConvolver();
const reverbOut = audioCtx.createGain();
reverbOut.gain.value = 0.9;
reverbConvolver.connect(reverbOut);
reverbOut.connect(masterGain);

// Map + loader
const reverbPresetMap = {};
REVERB_PRESETS.forEach((p) => {
  reverbPresetMap[p.id] = p;
});

function loadReverbPreset(id) {
  const preset = reverbPresetMap[id] || REVERB_PRESETS[0];
  reverbConvolver.buffer = generateImpulseResponse(audioCtx, preset);
}

// Initialize default preset (Teldex-style scoring stage)
loadReverbPreset("teldex_stage");

// Hook UI dropdown → reverb engine
if (reverbPresetSelect) {
  reverbPresetSelect.value = "teldex_stage";
  reverbPresetSelect.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
    loadReverbPreset(e.target.value);
  });
}
```

> 🔴 **Important:** Don’t change your per-pad reverb routing. You should still have this inside the pad audio graph:

```js
const reverbSend = audioCtx.createGain();
reverbSend.gain.value = 0.0;

// ...

filterNode.connect(reverbSend);
reverbSend.connect(reverbConvolver);
```

Those lines now feed into the new convolution reverb with the selected preset.

---

Once you make **these three edits**:

- You’ll have a **5-space convolution reverb** (Teldex-style, Kaufman Astoria-style, Grand Hall, Studio Room, Vintage Plate).
- Each pad’s **Reverb Mix** still controls how hard it hits the space.
- Switching presets on the Master panel instantly swaps the “room” the whole kit lives in.

If you want next: we can give **each pad its own reverb space selector** (e.g. drums in “Studio Room”, piano in “Grand Hall”) using multiple shared convolvers and per-pad sends.
